## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: We’re Broke
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
We need accountability in Washington. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/elderforpresident.com/230612-were-broke-1947212?e=0be619cbaa)
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=a97a0eb2a0&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# We Need Accountability in Washington
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

I hate to break it to you, but America’s flat broke. With $32 trillion in debt and an annual deficit expected to exceed $1 trillion for yet another year, we’re in dire straits. And unfortunately, politicians don’t treat our fiscal situation with the seriousness it requires, kicking the can down the road with yet another debt ceiling increase without meaningful cuts or long-term spending reforms.

**In my newest column at the Daily Caller, I lay out a commonsense solution to this problem, and it begins with holding politicians accountable.**[**Click here to read.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=d8f76ae7ce&e=0be619cbaa)

Americans know they can’t run a business or a household this way, and politicians shouldn’t be allowed to run a country this way, either. They also know if they don’t do their jobs, they’ll get fired. The same should be true of politicians.

When I’m president, I’ll propose real consequences for this fiscal insanity. If politicians can’t manage to restrict government spending to 10% of Gross Domestic Product (GDP), they’ve got to go. It’s that simple. If they refuse, they should be ineligible to run for re-election.

Things have been so crazy in Washington for so long that capping government spending might seem like an unconventional way to approach our nation’s debt and deficit crises. But it’s going to take an outsider not beholden to political interests to do what it takes to get our nation’s financial house in order.

**And to make that happen, we need your help. Your donation of any size – even $1 – will help me secure my place in the GOP presidential primary debates.**
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW →](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=c48c205fc2&e=0be619cbaa "CONTRIBUTE NOW →")
---
| Thank you,

**Larry Elder**
GOP Candidate for President

**P.S. When I’m president, it’ll be the end of politics as usual. Career politicians won’t like that, but the American people will. But I need your help.**[**Hit the tip jar to bring us one step closer to the White House**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=ff99ec2fdf&e=0be619cbaa)**.**

name: Robert F Kennedy Jr
subject: Running on Truth – the Promise of America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Today, I am proud to share a short documentary about our historic launch.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=1)
---
Hello Peter, At the launch of this campaign in Boston just over a month ago, **_I declared that I was running for President for all Americans_**. Today, I am proud to share a short documentary about our historic launch.**Please take a moment to[watch this video](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=2) and share it with your family and friends.** **_Running on Truth – The Promise of America_** [](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=3) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=4 "WATCH NOW") [WATCH NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=4)
---
I’m a lifelong Democrat. I’m proud of my family’s long history in this party – standing up for the voiceless and the downtrodden when no one else would and trying to end wars that drain our nation’s coffers, leave our world less safe, and our working and middle class less well off.
But it doesn’t matter today what party you identify with, **_I am here to fight for all of us. Democrat, Republican, Libertarian, and Independent_** – what unites us is always more powerful than what divides us.
I’ve spent my entire career, over three decades in the trenches fighting for the environment, the health of our children, clean water, and clean air. I’ve spent my life standing up to the biggest corporations on Earth – those that hide the pollution and harm of their products behind powerful lobbyists and big PR firms.
**Please join me today in helping spread this message to your family and friends – who are eager for a new Generation of Leadership.**[**Your support today will make all the difference!** ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=5)
As a Democrat today, I’m as concerned about the powerful elements of my own party and of corporate interests as my father and uncle were over 50 years ago. Today, we have a media and political establishment that is desperate to hide the truth from us and worse – censoring those who dare to stand up and tell the truth. This is antithetical to democracy.
Young and old, poor and middle class, urban, rural, and everywhere in between – **[I'm asking you today to join this campaign](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=6) and support our efforts to reclaim the heart and soul of our nation. **
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=7 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=7)
---
**My father ran for President in 1968, on a similar mission. He ran to heal and unite a nation experiencing deep division and tribalism.**
55 years ago, my father ran against the president of his own party, against war, and in a time of unprecedented polarization. Many felt he had no chance of winning. Yet, on the day he died, he won the California primary and South Dakota primary, uniting the most urban state and the most rural state on the same day toward one common vision for America.
When my father was buried, he was taken by train from New York to Washington, DC. That train ride normally takes less than 2 hours. That day, it took over 7 hours as 2 million people stood on the tracks to say goodbye. I will never forget how I felt seeing Black and white men together and hearing so many singing the Battle Hymn of the Republic.
**Before my father passed, as he was on the campaign trail in 1968,** he visited many of the poorest communities in America, in West Virginia and the Mississippi Delta. When he came back from the Delta one day, he told us around the dinner table**:**
_“I was in a tar paper shack today, smaller than this dining room, with 2 families living there. The children eat one meal a day. When you get older, I want you to help these people." - Robert F. Kennedy Sr._
When he brought us to these communities, **my Dad often told us** :__
_"These are your people. These are Kennedy people. Big shots, corporations, and millionaires, they have lobbyists and PR firms. They have lawyers. They don’t need the Kennedys. These are the people you need to spend the rest of your life helping."_
When I’m president, I’m going to be president for those people. You give me a piece of ground and a sword, and I am going to take back this country– with your help and the help of all Democrats, Republicans, Libertarians, and Independents — who are Americans first.
Please take a moment to [**watch my full announcement speech from Boston**](https://www.kennedy24.com/historic_presidential_announcement_in_boston_ma?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=8) outlining my platform and vision for America.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=9)[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=10)[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=11)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=12)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_unopens&n=13).

name: American Action News
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7klu1iav1dbothljnfgm44tvankchdqdu9f388_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5jmeor6c1h2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. clean_body: Something strange is happening in our financial system. | Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning: "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..." What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - Dr. Prins says: "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pno90%2fjbVAEzMPTguYgK8A&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668173%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z8R8BQPiCxKW0i662rhsng&sysid=1)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668174%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vL7dJlPE9DQXKLc%2bs7unDA&sysid=1)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668185%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xvWGiQiu%2f6Q3MWT%2bR9kqdw&sysid=1)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668186%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BY1oPBwnaF14lKizIejukA&sysid=1)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668187%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bJurcuSRjqN1ce01Lt7dPQ&sysid=1)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668188%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W02Ni4q%2fgjGqr5VyJ4%2b8eg&sysid=1)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668189%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2k2jakLEkyMqfv5UDrvoCw&sysid=1)**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. . And I’ll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, . American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqsumcnsi229ibit7t7u34d1s1d1lr5pgeunndt0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ge8oj4cph2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj3hdvbm9c0hr90vsc67jlv4jbifch1ok9vn7hmg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ge8oj4cph2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6of09g39nsed9oavk8s4sdg2lgii57bvjp97gmo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ge8oj4cph2bs)
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWbasJfDaN

Vivek 2024

I've said this since day one - this campaign is a
bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders
but by people like you.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWbasJfDaN

$27.77
That was our average donation in
May, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign
just over 3 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot
supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a
difference.

This campaign is proving that
building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington
insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them.
That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that
our message and solutions are what are going to revive our
nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To
keep this going and actually impact change, I need you to join me
and put some skin in the game with me.

Can I count on you to chip in $1,
$5, or even our average gift for last month - $27.77?

Chip in $1 ➔

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $27.77 ➔

This isn't just a political
campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic
pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our
purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of
your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from
conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a
grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the
Washington elite.

We are leading this race with
actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates
appear afraid to even say. But, I need your help to amplify our
ideas and message.

Please add your voice to the
growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN $27.77
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rrTUI%2feaeP1X1nNVfgz2lw&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70779%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kij9J1Ozc6gygtBN9mqNxA&sysid=1)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Great America Update

subject: I’m a former federal prosecutor, openly gay Democrat, and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District -- a critical swing seat that could decide the House Majority.
body:
This House district is a “top offensive target” for Democrats
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta94f91ea-d4f3-4135-8b7d-84456ee0bf5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

I’m a former federal prosecutor, openly gay Democrat, and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District \-- a critical swing seat that could decide the House Majority. When I ran for this seat last year, none of the pundits thought we had a shot in this Republican-leaning district. But we shocked everyone by nearly unseating a 30-year incumbent. _Dems now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district, which is why National Democrats have listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in 2024._ My opponent is Ken Calvert -- a Trump-endorsed extremist who is best-known for his staunch opposition to LGTBQ rights and for outing a gay political opponent. **[We have another shot at putting an end to his career, but I can’t do this without your support. Please split a donation of $ask or $5, $35, $100 to my campaign and Blue Amp Action right away to become a Founding Donor of my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3d0bcf4-2802-46a0-96d2-79b146fb6973/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Will.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Your America
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25130%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xlHhzTIQBLJAOQAGaLD9Zg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25131%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yIWYymODy60O7uY0YpSI9A&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25131%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yIWYymODy60O7uY0YpSI9A&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=629e1508b7404fe9b0b0f49e00def3c4&_e=w_rao1WZ4x5AqteTa5H15CMHaL5MuEAoa-3iKIkW4Cth_d-1vmYbFnmdnPLHg19D2OdKNJ1FylEsVtXW8uRA09fTJIvi2yfyjORLdCBneofzOnKe1OASf_evHhBmYFSF-p0pLIfnZ5cOMSgIjKD242QBMioshOpZ9pulJX7BJR3HMZ6yNY8kAtof4bNP11AZjlsJOANIM8rnHZkmLgmS3QebqGQfjRoypcqVBrCrULLXjgVXUK3Ji4ndKoinbs7vcIG3FDN7E5O1zlwP1hKTxyerJ7aDkILlnSz_4ZUFKXh3zJwqYkG6FrhuyLvvm-X07_JVVrVqNDjrHm5EHD23s0iiOYQV9KSIsv71Oq7tQ_NYS2GWGF5vBzAIa3rHHkucQ_DXM7SL34O0QRF8PwytMxu7QMHzwX1bjgisQqp4BhQ%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=629e1508b7404fe9b0b0f49e00def3c4&_e=w_rao1WZ4x5AqteTa5H15CMHaL5MuEAoa-3iKIkW4Cth_d-1vmYbFnmdnPLHg19D2OdKNJ1FylEsVtXW8uRA09fTJIvi2yfyjORLdCBneofzOnKe1OASf_evHhBmYFSF-p0pLIfnZ5cOMSgIjKD242QBMioshOpZ9pulJX7BJR3HMZ6yNY8kAtof4bNP11AZjlsJOANIM8rnHZkmLgmS3QebqGQfjRoypcqVBrCrULLXjgVXUK3Ji4ndKoinbs7v_LJUFqq2_1hejMDDVNkauQh5MQTRxh_6PYyvtRFoZV9RZbni0NaUzxDmIC5hLF842O9vnuokq9F3AEu-OTTpJw23JAk56T86gmJN8M4NtrZteMiE97tq24mehLOfEpEolH1jJrcs2WM7jAM-eOnia_AUXGh_WrvvdvQ8aH1T-c0%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=629e1508b7404fe9b0b0f49e00def3c4&_e=w_rao1WZ4x5AqteTa5H15CMHaL5MuEAoa-3iKIkW4Cth_d-1vmYbFnmdnPLHg19D2OdKNJ1FylEsVtXW8uRA09fTJIvi2yfyjORLdCBneofzOnKe1OASf_evHhBmYFSF-p0pLIfnZ5cOMSgIjKD242QBMioshOpZ9pulJX7BJR3HMZ6yNY8kAtof4bNP11AZjlsJOANIM8rnHZkmLgmS3QebqGQfjRoypcqVBrCrULLXjgVXUK3Ji4ndKoinbs7vf7XenUWk7oPuEEw82jAnxun-gxdHGSt04UZM5DQbAQB8n-9nKtG-gf4S8zpPmvsCFTn-BJQY9FjYkoMh7cIGSxqPDP-NLqShcL3mP_tenegYhGBcMSbl62_MNecjizZO5CkMlROQkesN3kUUMJSGIomoRu5pHtCFa7T5AktVifY%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09fa0adab4594071b5b0b9961709b363&_e=psZuTwXomWTQfJiSkTyZf8k2yOy0gkASOUMDepZqW3x-1iT0TwCOOI-gl6EXWyJ-1HKGcp94Qq2yY98LHRA5FUUTS0bjtjgKpIqPLkSJ5T1TJuBT5oGXOi5h20vTeJdWx4R1N_OUtG7x3vR7xAMMdKRN2NywCzjUfPrI48QKwthj6uP_jTAAkatAaqqylDECBvZiy6CsJoEg5yccvFwjjD9YUYfvaxI8KZS4if0FxoceEvGTOrDghMiJyAhmfnCCPxjJoMm8qJ0Lk_nwekgRDLojCaXxkHogAm5Xc4022SF4dp2CllcFiPBldKUD2YeOsrjjNeomnSggZkkXuMMagNOhBZxswqPjWkA65frZyeSqTW-YwpOlxoSbCq1UNHJp)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09fa0adab4594071b5b0b9961709b363&_e=psZuTwXomWTQfJiSkTyZf8k2yOy0gkASOUMDepZqW3x-1iT0TwCOOI-gl6EXWyJ-1HKGcp94Qq2yY98LHRA5FUUTS0bjtjgKpIqPLkSJ5T1TJuBT5oGXOi5h20vTeJdWx4R1N_OUtG7x3vR7xAMMdKRN2NywCzjUfPrI48QKwthj6uP_jTAAkatAaqqylDECBvZiy6CsJoEg5yccvFwjjD9YUYfvaxI8KZS4if0Fxoe70WhgXJ1L7kJFxE1qQrwtin87nStlvrQP-QZMFj8dcK9-eN_rNJUb-RYTRsAvx393tvZNYcO8bQoSyEj7IxACIGiGls8qIBQnQrc-rqFYg3OrCrvSBYEbxY8HBfA7OnRf7fI_KjsA_ZEq3i3TL9PB)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---

clean_body: The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input. Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below? By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system. Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America. Best regards, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Elizabeth BeShears, AFC
subject: Do parents deserve a voice in the classroom?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
Opponents of school choice say parents have no say in children's curriculum, but we want your thoughts.

| | |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34144d1919694889bbc60d22c95448b5&_e=fN7va6togCoTCwcDXlwk5qyGOFMSemkoczCs-9UvtyV5uP4JlIYzSRbFn4AH0NPTsttY-kFLzaDS7Z9J5b9bZVz9tLMtDGMU9ketO2hbgD4nVQNdDhRphRAmMlRH0u8rnQpL5yHkJtx6rJyEkwubOuppu4YmmmFDSfqs1kL2x8_uRla3WCPFzBUPAiM0rwFibI3B-PKuBVx-SOm32t2Dj9WrVCZYmpf8iilx2eldeD6T5dHB3W7xvos3xxalFVITjbYUYBaYvV9CEGeNlQGu-4uAGNkMryS2PUVBtFzuykLeY8tCSwBrJzj_Vib27SN8nKTmFJtApkL5Mv12onHkKajECnbsswXu7HMtv4YfmxyMHT7B2E_1z1uyNV2oH0h2HoeLP_SoRZpTDecDDHohc2Jsg33iefP2kaiQNr3WAVzQza--ID9xtGjEe83hfq5E)
---
| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **"****_Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids ' school curriculum. They don't."_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That's why we're reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children 's education: parents or teachers unions?**
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34144d1919694889bbc60d22c95448b5&_e=fN7va6togCoTCwcDXlwk5qyGOFMSemkoczCs-9UvtyV5uP4JlIYzSRbFn4AH0NPTsttY-kFLzaDS7Z9J5b9bZVz9tLMtDGMU9ketO2hbgD4nVQNdDhRphRAmMlRH0u8rnQpL5yHkJtx6rJyEkwubOuppu4YmmmFDSfqs1kL2x8_uRla3WCPFzBUPAiM0rwFibI3B-PKuBVx-SOm32t2Dj9WrVCZYmpf8iilx2eldeD6T5dHB3W7xvos3xxalFVITjbYUYBaYvV9CEGeNlQGu-4uAGNkMryS2PUVBtFzuykL2fq5gFywh55um9CBXx6WhnvVHU29cCQR5L3qVmbE5kyf9QvKKl4NXNP1sZCDKKGxSaph3YuyqTkUSJ84_5YPx5gaKxrgx9QBX0DXzlMfrI5_NQTiW_dmNXmBR-ea3uowZDidbDASbm-mTrv9uAAX_)
---
| | Since 2020, Randi Weingarten has been actively involved and responsible in keeping public schools closed, but even worse, she's worked to sabotage the school choice movement wherever she can. **She 's left children behind, and parents without options.** Friend, do you think she really has the best interests of parents, students, or even teachers in mind? **Take our poll and let us know your thoughts:** **<[LINK](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34144d1919694889bbc60d22c95448b5&_e=fN7va6togCoTCwcDXlwk5qyGOFMSemkoczCs-9UvtyV5uP4JlIYzSRbFn4AH0NPTsttY-kFLzaDS7Z9J5b9bZVz9tLMtDGMU9ketO2hbgD4nVQNdDhRphRAmMlRH0u8rnQpL5yHkJtx6rJyEkwubOuppu4YmmmFDSfqs1kL2x8_uRla3WCPFzBUPAiM0rwFibI3B-PKuBVx-SOm32t2Dj9WrVCZYmpf8iilx2eldeD6T5dHB3W7xvos3xxalFVITjbYUYBaYvV9CEGeNlQGu-4uAGNkMryS2PUVBtFzuykIpapyFgY5DJtJuWodgZQz71JqPg8_aJEwhl69UYWcNWhwybOiMGvtb_txjbcQ3Th_NBnJZzcDXyZELjKDE94YZnZb-qQ-IFW1M-zAqEvXOa0cduox1WYUDeOJg7y4tydTfyRBjWqEH-eof9MuHa7A2)>** Thank you, Elizabeth BeShears American Federation for Children

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XnPLxxrvgfnQ6RIk5EEPsA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668196%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F0eHYont6PzsAPfbYHEDPw&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TVnUA%2fOOaFM7ROS9UqzJwg&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668198%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vGZHRsOmWgOfcD%2b35YGDzg&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668199%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o5wtkzU%2bIB3iExkDRFhb5g&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: BREAKING: INDICTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
A BIDEN-APPOINTED FEDERAL PROSECUTOR HAS INDICTED ME.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zklevisa0n93mrfea4jpqrnd9o4be5qs6mijgf8o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ieco72clh2bs)
---
Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger ... _

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8fd10ef7d4b4ffe92f08fe7af7404ce&_e=PEeHcjoUn9aCy7WpMtE5FaUS82Wz4JrY11pZDN2xiYpbQ31JxNRWUuQcgY2BeL9an2rrd6sgmTvoU-s91e7HI5TEFjP-WnI7a75KXU-uK5B9n_d0WxXaEhE3rE9rjD838343im4EDCcP2M4soHztmpMcW6KvqPDWmgrpWpPL6mt--pHDY3l3MYP1c9S2TAm01JQ6OD90SCrviEboR1kCZOPWucbYUQTIeSeNDALaeIJiQMEDo75l36bDyj3Pffk0_tQsqhdyIKwNAl9yKyo-EEA4SAZ7OMRZ2dCHgKPiTFmTYJF6f1RSQXN7yoW8fBeb92_Z4eiXvTzuWH82VzgvJtjhKaqaLs6AWlUHOWCsG7qtiuwQC554b4usuvFR3dFi9rA7JtlAZ8f3RbyMGX1h7gs0BdC3UOtsnYP1FOLvNzc%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8fd10ef7d4b4ffe92f08fe7af7404ce&_e=PEeHcjoUn9aCy7WpMtE5FaUS82Wz4JrY11pZDN2xiYpbQ31JxNRWUuQcgY2BeL9an2rrd6sgmTvoU-s91e7HI5TEFjP-WnI7a75KXU-uK5B9n_d0WxXaEhE3rE9rjD838343im4EDCcP2M4soHztmpMcW6KvqPDWmgrpWpPL6mt--pHDY3l3MYP1c9S2TAm01JQ6OD90SCrviEboR1kCZOPWucbYUQTIeSeNDALaeIJiQMEDo75l36bDyj3Pffk0W9HaxZ4wyBM0rXs5iaDmOHMCZ6tALmgHVrz2idR_l3bRmCwapzXwTs3w1sQjVsPXX8Y263d_9fzVTCyQhej_Ds7Vk5m2KrLBN5eLIDeGRHb8nllsEn6Z_T2DAk4OeDyxaLzU6QTQO_SrDJtMnWA9HitxfwyIUhG0dXhB9jzc4hs%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8fd10ef7d4b4ffe92f08fe7af7404ce&_e=PEeHcjoUn9aCy7WpMtE5FaUS82Wz4JrY11pZDN2xiYpbQ31JxNRWUuQcgY2BeL9an2rrd6sgmTvoU-s91e7HI5TEFjP-WnI7a75KXU-uK5B9n_d0WxXaEhE3rE9rjD838343im4EDCcP2M4soHztmpMcW6KvqPDWmgrpWpPL6mt--pHDY3l3MYP1c9S2TAm01JQ6OD90SCrviEboR1kCZOPWucbYUQTIeSeNDALaeIJiQMEDo75l36bDyj3Pffk0tUJ-XcVnSjBIHvAwhMBw-63LYt2EKlRU7FUDUhb7A4b-AhaWZEyX2qeQIFJFCEiQtPnpGCssrOPLVKUVb6-nXeMoQF4Ovt9xMXc8BD39srechRyn-7siby-Rh8Tw8ydxs1f0WwoS_wndId1jLhDr8qqPe9qOz5ks_IR9FDf2PvA%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of Imprimis --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below? Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... . . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. Why is this? Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTchcf1q_JliFVXcjbpRt9nSxZ37HmkWDKmJLGRHtEsKY-CQx02ssIqUs0m8BHLlXnZpyW-mdmBVSsHriUK1Aa_CkeEOVWxcLaeNqr3Loq_KqgnoDgdU8y13W1ZEitAZjw4MJD7PG7Y_LxNI2w4H_v_DtCOUaJDl5z16jpUmjDuma)
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTS-KDuQ4crLLlG_rnhuilhaDSZ_7umSNNC4QrYU2I4mism80JGwaMjvzowPmDxLbbcC2N_Ix9KFJuWW2LHkWJUUk6z1jZKCsq0eGrhkHmQKkv8nIpHrU0V3whUoU1TCohX4edxblIsiws3775Z6ybmqHb7GLDcs8GmElrWMDgBfy)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTbh4nGSZhyn-vXERPNWGCC-eHqeBJrTmafzztVhf5-sdEKzOBPkvZX2dTFGR9UP5Hnj_lLQqYvWhQqwlpuPbyBNAl_htLnRuU7Or2NKD-BihIp1JG-6ibdWK4vTQpMJoyB850--2j_faHTh1QjAz230gv_lZvQ-cin6yupd8Q-_G)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTXCgQFXSUz6eyE5EQZt5UqxNBOdlSMwamdCxyx6DkRfzrmcdDT0kjC4rAr6gEAyD-kREHusAI1JIQJZ25xGIUB8OeFQ_gMT0mH4qw8LTQdF9fG69XR3fIdHmLlrhNApktJEYM2F_pe8_3ukelRodb_yn5HrtKNYzcD82JEuj4a3r)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTchMR2oDzJCk3xOrApFncLpEaS8LbRyVYLRDitFFWpu14ERIzRpcZnBYVoUbpu3MMMuGCFVp5Xkm85cBt9004CCRp7C98dHp1WXq0LgmgUSw1TOfJbbcANHkBMwC1053hveRDsq1IVpt-rlPgdeonzSEuDRcjZruYmoR0zJhsBwq)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTTAu7CXET32biPbxwMnD9RTkPABrTVjn-unZhi8T8kgeTf8qJQqIzelKtyho_2hKgVpwBFsoAatFBIbqehEt9wP3BU4ys6VY1k_FEMDnnYx_hJ6AiWqzV9n8QYZcIY4zU_hMMVSi-aQ7QNpj2nCf336mSPeBfpNkAXagi7EhA8Zo)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTfDE08UwEBUoHx5soV4Q5fjDRXSlNmjn8EiKUCVzYavdunEy4zuj0J2qbD4LhkAIMQF8gmKd1haVSweQrLGmCU8Wm1YMe5qo_dQHLamy2B3rcaEHbIIHxq8j7iY79HfvK5J_QujnrSwa2qHu_mKdd8rwmne73O_LEOusCeKtRjZB)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ffaf42ea7ea443b98d9bbc115193061e&_e=3aMBVfPDgdXAYA4rWURP5Zk95ZUDSBeDPd-BgaK4X22b96-WaUSszpqQR8kFc67jUtvBthqeybllFj4v7n8VHpHriyMw0EuAaF8-L5tP9fr8D1rm1iU7r8WZ5j1i6pUcCe5mxJYNj5U40azmKIeQNO3_e8ch1RAqt0eCcPyt6VwJQh4xGEF5c3BeBtsGUjUB4W3g88r3-z9oImsEJjTtTZ9pRYJh7o5Tl6IRoInJ__dKcSXniGFJZOEpApva8yu9WLzZl05A5Ij5Uk2CqJqjaQtWT9K3gCmXKXm0POQn54OxLqnN4NlZcq1Wx-6bUAdfGDuyHSaffayE26vVRCV_K2iQHyEJQoKCNF1gRltmGHk7mmmJ4VKdVs-KGbgcmN7R)**.

| | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89ed8a388dd24d04ac1e8c59ae1f3bbf&_e=fzFhq7JI0pJQQujv2AY6EPZlxV-emysnI1pSiG2_lqarACIkFuCHoEnCfJ5C_eTCPn__Y34dU6_ucS-gVgmOQcecoyP8ebQc_xNBOpIJAJtTJNYRQwhZDuwRCOdvNwrbeM6zbxPuDjuU13AflB6XxfivDBQSEsib96hPKh0z3nfwek1mjqRCPKy4HjVXjZ-p0hxzAnzymSDmF6ersOq51ieW3-Z8I7giUCz3J_RyxyN9CbJT3gCcCKTExynGXY6YPClaiBEE9n3a9IjutH8H1icbMqS1fA1WNbzKliYtIDxXsHfnR9PxBKlzMz8JgR1kI04SxyxX9_tRLVPMnVI69W3Yf9CcISFec-g07IvjCsb8-arlptOEQ0YUt70-u91avY_4RGPsRDyvL4LkT2Dr0g%3D%3D)

Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger ... _
...We broke fundraising records. 3 independent polls showed us beating Joe Biden by 7 POINTS. In fact, polls show I'm the _ONLY_ Republican who can beat Crooked Joe.
**So, after a _state_ prosecutor _failed_ to break us, the Deep State sharpened their attacks and unleashed a FEDERAL prosecutor to TRY and take us down.**
_But let me be as clear as possible:_
**No matter how viciously they attack me, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left - and I will NEVER end this presidential campaign that puts YOU first.**

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmko24l8t0tsvqmav35hrdc4cbgb5tvukeroe8v0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ieaor6c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3dbeh742ee3lesft0e86s3e49lkqe08oigcifv8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ieaor6c3h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9odte27tejvlffg42v6dsam5f9nki3eolddvk4o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ieaor6c3h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zql12j8fjpfid9hh600s0nvhl9vr12skd3rhk290_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ieaor6c3h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt7ik8kkr9utorfq500v2di2k78uv1c2guo5kq2o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5ieaor6c3h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
