name: James OKeefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)
[](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkD9r5DAQRz-N3Nno38p24eLAuNsrjoUrxVia9SorWUYeE_Ltw26SIpAi7ePNwPv9P9szhBjW5S8kHKiQLbvNycalznfEK9ZABO5uJZeq5qYWwqrKD7qVXpkKB2E6o3vTClHdBt_L1rTCd9pr5Ib3VzyBU53xXvXQuSoMjz_cCCGEbpVuTKukAClRQ9_zU880h4iF9oZuWHA75hgcrISQGpdTFYcb0bYz9YfJicnJ5xUImxhmLPS2HFB8k8vC5PQCCffvEXWa6y1vwNR0ULJ7PopDpsYfVCbNQ0now5GYGp9nH8xB2iAsK1Njmj8ZOabGy79L_ZXHpIGUj5WYGuWpKoPfXkOMYTct03xJEOKzh367-XsAAAD__1l6iWo)**.

---

The Republican Team

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3297616759dc431dbb68b440b45e1020&_e=s9NNAsxw5MJmBJvFXyY62wCS1inlXtrPhQuB0aP8I8ntyo0XcZHU8N212OP-oJEl7goIFaiVrJ5CZvh83U8jBoPZkNnyLgbVW2GQ4jFACXi-0rH-QDLFLdjwor538yjiwC9RYkCFRr8U3pzrmMDbsr0Zb8TdcK4mbIU097GWxH7ze9fTDkF_wujlqi3bRiscSKsGGlQuNlAL5wl9dlw-pItAsykR6wMC0xTLb5jrh73MLko5c8JhNDk4BKCYIpst) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3297616759dc431dbb68b440b45e1020&_e=s9NNAsxw5MJmBJvFXyY62wCS1inlXtrPhQuB0aP8I8ntyo0XcZHU8N212OP-oJEl7goIFaiVrJ5CZvh83U8jBoPZkNnyLgbVW2GQ4jFACXg6Dl3anqoDNkJl4xI1BsP52HGl3JKE9nBGQZ4OVVKfGbJWc5VfTcu38c36NspqiHQZ62Wa-tnL2rgCK8QjvaN08K3iORHf1AoiRNwpVB4c6w_1qYr6pAfj-qOMflF6rkErDFFdLNs6-3fATgl9y1Mw) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3297616759dc431dbb68b440b45e1020&_e=s9NNAsxw5MJmBJvFXyY62wCS1inlXtrPhQuB0aP8I8ntyo0XcZHU8N212OP-oJEl7goIFaiVrJ5CZvh83U8jBoPZkNnyLgbVW2GQ4jFACXibXpS9_qN1Pp3Ee6TcBvhwvPj5G0A14m8EtX_yhCHGK0jveEjsoNYI6-k6K6RTXDDhwKyvFkyu6416374_dLKFn16Z49vFiCnjdZVVrp6nANc3CXdDkqBBZMhZIIlN6D8C6KdqCqxMPd6CtFpCDpcX)

In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c54e124af5ef48378353eddf7829702f&_e=kk8VDXWXyFI187HdDtSybfYenpAva3CSqvJZ5eJnjcQOA29pmDWMW64IUUy1Lbad_Qvb5yVMw6RDSVChgq5g_H9cI83B57WA27tnoXg3lN8VJDKyxdzgnEgXMuks5TAJDXKrzA76ymYzAMs_KgtaskJ0t2o_PP0mOal7YAZA_ZljVY7YCZ8QRVnP4iar10JWi5LdaeK9r-rg54hfJ9W_fhzsIXMnElLrbI-MSL73nP3A_ACWI4WLQfGTJ58z8F8JGr7vn8WcjWg0_1eRMgjbJQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z28e3uf47tajv4ghpidv538i2k5kevidl3e51lvo_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg60p36c1h2bs)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7td0pq0k1vehtuh47jnrcaf92bs39itsu98s3bo_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg60p36c1h2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ke9hj494f5qcjkeii2shjp0jjclna82q0cn758_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg60p36c1h2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsu4q36pm0ndmu5qs9h8l9uqa5nsjdn57brp2qr8_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg60p36c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn8sg5dkopam34k068eo9t5mhv71hh5j8gjclqbo_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg60p36c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: I’m on a list you don’t want to be on:
body:
I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one? | | | | | | | | | | I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one?
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=285ca6111e&e=84ee529f47)
---
Friend, A new list of the most vulnerable members of Congress was just published – and my name is on it.

As a freshman Congresswoman who won with just 51.1% of the vote, I have to say the fact I’m under attack doesn’t really surprise me.

The Democrats in Washington see my seat as an easy pickup to restore their majority.

_But this is about so much more than just a majority to me.
_
This is about serving you, giving you a better quality of life, and restoring beauty and peace to Oregon’s 5th district.

[_**Please make your best contribution to help me combat the attacks coming from the liberal establishment. >>**_](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ae892abd0e&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d8c0c75b98&e=84ee529f47)
---
I think the majority of politicians forget that districts like mine aren’t just chess pieces in some game.

_They’re communities and homes filled with real people who are really impacted by the decisions made in Washington.
_
_But I haven’t forgotten that.
_
I haven’t forgotten that you elected me to fix our mounting crime and drug problem, fight for parental rights in schools, and prioritize American citizens by securing our border.

_And I’m working hard every day to get these things done for you, friend.
_
But that doesn’t leave me with a lot of time to fundraise or engage with these political attacks.

So I’m counting on you to help me get the fundraising out of the way so that I can keep my focus on delivering results for the people of Oregon.

[_**Please, make your best contribution to help me combat the attacks coming from the liberal establishment so that I can keep my focus on getting work done for you. >> **_](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=cdd0429433&e=84ee529f47)
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=89e5c8d1de&e=84ee529f47)
---
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=928a5a262f&e=84ee529f47)
---

|
---
---
---
---
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=eed653cba9&e=84ee529f47)
---
---
|
---
---
---
Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom.

That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American.
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b5ed07e4b3&e=84ee529f47)
---
_Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress:_
* [**Restoring our Economy**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=8058fa52a2&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Parental Choice in Oregon Schools**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=bbf6bf7086&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Low Taxes, Balanced Budgets**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ede7406ebf&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Keeping our Communities Safe**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=88ba1340d2&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Putting America and Oregon First**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0cede08b05&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Supporting our Veterans and Armed Forces**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=a0f90d3524&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Empowering Farmers and Ranchers**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b8c098ed1a&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Improving Transportation and Infrastructure**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=6602861230&e=84ee529f47)
* [**Fighting Homelessness**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c3b6aab041&e=84ee529f47)

If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, [_**please consider making a contribution today. >**_](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=16634f3c3b&e=84ee529f47)
---

Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress
13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399
Happy Valley, OR 97086 **Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America →
**

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
We value your input.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi712vdkdipl5mg0e988cgfn9mq7f56fh5olirr0_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg64o76c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuv81riu089m3o4a7n9ufnkpge8djafqgvafqqk0_rp22sh2s8i66o73clg64o76c1h2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

subject: State Republicans introduce new barriers to the ballot box, while state Democrats work to protect LGBTQ+ youth… and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, June 11th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKWQfZXhzjJsJJss3eapS7QL8Y9gaK-Gg_OmuHksKD84BPloxZHApCmXylLMZ4KfznVUzBXWb2rcxmkgUbCM4CrFkBTxRhnNXwXC0mb_DloHR-kun44S7HGhHgh2z2gZpRPdsVCWUL7sj00qlLYmtC2D8GD1itOOSkUQqiBSvxnb8pXl8q5a8jJBP5soLedfZNX8qxPwVS1i8YCFe1B0SpzYStz9fONpm7hvj3LdJbw-pGVPDANUpIiUnq_uFd60b1O3OSy_mVqlG8AEbCe9PoG3q7eZm647xVZ-yC4vLuIdnoawrRMegBFwh8g6igRWUtf4dhrusnUuLkmT2qrPi8gHxnYjZo1iQLkUM9vZMmzP0ul3F4RXexVNLYzzTJVQn96Ff7LFUUPeUlg1ewu3ZJTIkr_GYjAKlUVpnxbPR6IZYdWIfop2F593uuaJ6WzIOVrMWCrds6V0X95V0iahsK5FxIgQ76oBjNrNaqJimuO-dkAF0wIvRYClDiF7fLkpBQ/3wy/ULiY7_MKRJuRa6IDirslNw/h0/4R4x6jxFuAJ5U9shcKnOaW8Z8LuYJXfSPsQrm3LMo7I)
---
1️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ Republicans introduce new barriers to the ballot box**
In North Carolina, Republicans introduced legislation to further restrict when absentee ballots can be counted and [**allow any voter to file a challenge to absentee ballots in their county →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLfuMssP84uvHwv0X_LB1vTGf8V9QxRVf1JpFTL9MqG2srrTJdrJub8aivb-IhumGr3oCj445H5RfcIWLnOb3eYnlBdjKaPyYqAVSAeeVWZIZ-SuHsgRwGGzO-a-o-OmtZPfCfVimsaGZoVEcs-AjjZIUgyin8YI09Db92R-nmvkebHdnCJbZXBC9tBhkQSukoh3dsvTYW1opM5DPEVndmdV6DN-5H-OMDJBWXCRU86CCXb9HTf-DRkcGRtk6Rlhsv5Op8rvUq5ZnFLdK7d5guYIBYTP-9Uraj6yvoAMKMQxrj4GDQvIVBRi6f0No4RBmXNkuEfmqTak5N25o7Glvhlk_WSCyBRIHeNPO_j4hqE4velE6nlBeOWYeTjuMDDBJIHhu9hpKYN56tZQE4ZWdujbTySnbiopCd40HI-Eg0rAAheF_v-mhFkg4sl5Ohnxr2TsV4Ig3IBOB793MQm3C-RfxLd8dNmFOaOVyHzMoopRle93VBZ8tGAybDeRobjUbCP0SJfpDR9AI8HOJB6pUZ20_agDUQqVWSZsRpGT5bkUbbZaYGrRO8Ey_PbjZHTBsxADuyVg7XTZXalZz-h2R-5KJcpQ-gMioZXZnbl7dijgqAo_IG5VJJLR72HN-MH1XFOKC2cFI1Uw4YyAguB_zYX4OYUfjWnV5E5zEaLnb0Ts/3wy/ULiY7_MKRJuRa6IDirslNw/h1/hAypDQMJj8e1odTeOSxMtJ2GDeX3tZAeZkyK79UF_Gg)
2️⃣ **_Michigan:_ Democrats move to ban conversion therapy for LGBTQ+ youth**
In Michigan, Democrats are considering a bill that would [**ban conversion therapy on minors in the state →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDO3A3JIXt-XpTu-fH7rxUza8OUWutplWtFUXU0PtNBCX_wnB88NFTCaE5aQ43gijdCDMr_V1UvrGrO5t7LxsQKbAhd_hL5kIceVL2YPZk2EOGJgifqv-6zQTGZVw_52yZFFiJ808DnMhjqqcUTgsxcs_V_1lGGAgc3eV0t2jIwSWuWUneixoREDB9I6xVv1sRMTZKAEoZ9RaxEHOCQY6O-pLZgod-w-Hop-2c10HKug0PTXAfpisq5DGFqw-DUswns9Tc-Akaxcbd0a3Qj-d3MjdPPwAQjA_B9fp4SNwKzANhy_KH5YeiCpZOSRKEBvRhEoX6TIWQdTtnNkbgsMaNJrGN0_b0JW_DZRdnFqOokZjVUOoa7sFgyjwB9IjTdbuNFmiGGXDZkXWiYco3DUMfYq299aPYjiEQdEDfU4YjVVzEwDPKsMIt9FkkisL27SCcyPWQd9cuXpuTiAQTR-a53bRSnpdVmvkJFDEG1kAN44mFQovu83nc2jf_Bz3rNUC0B2lILJ3koBdjVWOUfZPQOXlucnzqrEMj6Ecosazvg1v1xEAYOInht5Jqu1o6htzuBDcc-YfDVKPQGdKSlWq68I2Gvc359E827spSyb4lNzDXb8QHu4xMKwB6rUO8dBrHO_Byg4tCqDsZ0tH9UJSpwnlAE421N1WqYKd9Yla6NJq5T2m-AtnzOMoSvk_3AS6ekmUZugNUBkRiVVfPQSs7us/3wy/ULiY7_MKRJuRa6IDirslNw/h2/8zSTK7dTShHoAGj8JziPSVVGVgrf4K5dlDLX2klGPeU)
3️⃣ **_Pennsylvania:_ Democrats secure funding for mental health programs**
In Pennsylvania, House Democrats passed a proposal funding adult mental health programs, which could [**expand access to behavioral health care in the commonwealth →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNDTRF0W6BaIZoXLIugMU9sSTafiEQigbxCzvl_unSwi8Ss24j3jpG5oYW5V9HwmHCsRMcMfW03fPculaThe-eaCP6fJOvEbAFbXL7_J2rkWZpCoaJs2OUFEcfDKRznTpbHaYd8OTvcd73QIZR_KoWAQLvoJ_Ypp1lYRTBwYt4sOdK53eHlKgj5nfyBg65dKhFYVwJd0xP8PKPvEetVGIyVd3wOhGoh5H5UrOAyZKvNMa_taoXxPA1SBCyBoV25G7jpOI1qNqHnfrvL3xWUo8-KgAYl5lI1e2cf1JZWkOx4Pwa_p2FLtc6rfP-x9rNCnnO2nDToOkkqCE9qTYYjmrhFxgzMhwbsT-pD6NmWMKHroaM5jiMPldHqJyO2dGhML4_QAzhn-lTw_3NTPUFstbFo6ByhTRV3VUU82-64wPyIFO0AJsp03Gg3Q9Pk1hmp-D78x3HagPYk5OJbWTpasi0o7OKtbTXIQYkNXlgjxX8YnQiuENC-xk_osBaz0d3sowX-J2edKK4FXfLEfDSh9-C4dqMhS-Xau5_oDHyn6sbITG9Bc_jkzP6OzmUw7cZDd26TLM_l23MnUAOm7k-WNt0Q7O-djtTE6LcBWxhhEC3Sa58A579MH5vwQG-g1Q3siTFNnGMqRqeQTNJQfEV_JMBBdnbXv-RDi2xFsIceaB6vHyjNuB97leP9Q_n6TPNlWRw/3wy/ULiY7_MKRJuRa6IDirslNw/h3/AQEcf6CFwGAdwHP_by4QPeOs5picapzrdnFdLc4MB7Q)
4️⃣ **_Watch:_ Montana state Rep. Zooey Zephyr speaks out against anti-trans bills**
Montana Rep. Zooey Zephyr shared how Republicans’ anti-trans legislation harms LGBTQ+ youth, and why [**Democrats are committed to expanding access to gender-affirming care →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhm45wUtxFbikHhlGrksvMQ-bzN9OfEiZRH1Q1JpQiRiesw-C1V_krxPAPh0GKUiLJp0Wk-PtfKmHhUrLYtkcEXNpfjOxNXOZuMqQnnt2Vl3H4IFif6N9kqPi3__ae_oKdTbVJBFJEOPRjiQYpWJlQWERuioxtUkXi91uUd1c4hDZVpw_O5D643mEitYmiGVDCqTltV9jaUyZYpP1yU93ae0UzFwGT86n6ktCW6TwjRZuj9hDee8qRVpF9b-jH3bc7Xa0VQS39qrLlee0fbxGdAB0rEAgApVCicgjyUEPb9Ue6Lgz-ZQcAJ1vrA6VeOOlDpR11i8CZ53zqzt1eKuGcyAg_5d7kAFrwIx8D__Fuwc550pyNj0IDQLWw-isp0BMHX_ZP4EmNta4fL3X5hoT32nYt_3lc7S7zsrIFzZfAH5nAUTrBsY_ibU4U0TVhz0gOAivYD-2RZsM9ij3zK3lUf59Y2TmW6VFjZANTnkvLFJkO-OyZc9b9p4du2GOWj1yz7xwEio7tUgz-naJv5Xiwy6KZHA6oLowKEaTj8tANl0AXVJzvMQw7dL9salwx4BE6BcgTazVxBp2X5YDF-vf1fCPlS4lEZOl0KWvdQ2A-t3NBA7ecEHhUQlFaW3cs3F1fg/3wy/ULiY7_MKRJuRa6IDirslNw/h4/Wx2aZ5y2QHAHpGAp0IN4E8rVpq1vxuaIP_Pn_dPTiGw)
🗳️ **_Special Elections:_ Democrats prepare for a tossup race in Maine**
On Tuesday, Democrats are facing a must-win special election for a seat in the Maine House. But this race will be _close_ so, [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to act →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXouWXB68nQKrBbPaac_9R8QJ6fBX-lo1ZRpIhz887nhnrGsIOYnsZQXMTCsRTV7oIVXqwQe3TeRcXhHr60Zw_PbxSiNFIz6Lb5CF5VJLNzqTPqXENITdqbiL6bvcCnpJKSZxBl6LfJbp-KIFv5xD5cGPUbzYBWw8pluHhcTyKXLAEYgu78P1uQyqefje56Ke-6IX5fxB2jr1s32ahNOMsby5Clfkma9I4NF8PPYLiWVGCmG2ryx8Amr9GT_dwH84TMAAKfwti8eafEAAebPvGdbFy32AdosIMsbNKsiTycT7QXgIkSim8OFxUqSizdnXuwHslRbmDun40TcmvWD1tsAgi17LTRBMBBOW4B7ubYVK_ZfDuJZ_G7qSGNGO7dhYccBvICXNDGAnPGRir5skJNgsZr52cv8SrfWLDlmBuAy9u5xhAZP8ofaimnufMwqCyHy_OeO6rLwYzxLZ_p9ZMwwv1XcPbEIF7JZ7lqSOIiu2-fF2-YRDKaids9EqXrTTBb1FSw4M65DtKO51S1Yu4DUZM/3wy/ULiY7_MKRJuRa6IDirslNw/h5/h07-UnJ0slgRD_-B7FDtKgRJuQZgjIqwtYc76UNlrRM)

subject: An imminent threat
body:
Friends - In case you missed it: The Human Rights Campaign has released an urgent warning for LGBTQ+ individu
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29580.341.1.c4c5967c368def0a30df4c83e576f346)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29580.342.1.dd10f97cae7796979e6fd882d6e9b179&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE3Mzk2NjE3Mi0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0xZTRiMzk1Y2RmZThkMzdhZTk5NmM5ZWZhZTM4OTBlNDFhN2QwNzgwIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI5NTgwIn0=) |
---
Friends - **_In case you missed it_** : The Human Rights Campaign has released an urgent warning for LGBTQ+ individuals in our country: For the first time, the organization has declared a State of Emergency for those of us in the LGBTQ+ community. Since the beginning of this year, more than 75 bills have been enacted into law against this community. My community. _Our_ community. More than 400 laws have been introduced in state legislatures, with more certainly to come as the rise of hatred against the community continues to be a part of the GOP's platform. From the President of the Human Rights Campaign: _“There is an imminent threat to the health and safety of millions of LGBTQ+ people and families, who are living every day in uncertainty and fear...It’s also incumbent on our allies across the country to stand with us and make it clear that they won’t sit idly by while extremists attack and malign LGBTQ+ people and our families."_ **Friends - our safety is directly linked to our representation in our government. With more LGBTQ+ visibility and more voices heard on a national stage, we can ensure that these laws and the bigotry that creates them are shunned out of public light.[Please, be a part of our historic campaign and help me to be the first-ever trans woman combat veteran in the United States House of Representatives.](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29580.343.1.262b4b8b03813f48b325153c3f7bd482)**

clean_body: Friends - In case you missed it: The Human Rights Campaign has released an urgent warning for LGBTQ+ individu | | = | Friends - In case you missed it : The Human Rights Campaign has released an urgent warning for LGBTQ+ individuals in our country: For the first time, the organization has declared a State of Emergency for those of us in the LGBTQ+ community. Since the beginning of this year, more than 75 bills have been enacted into law against this community. My community. Our community. More than 400 laws have been introduced in state legislatures, with more certainly to come as the rise of hatred against the community continues to be a part of the GOP's platform. From the President of the Human Rights Campaign: “There is an imminent threat to the health and safety of millions of LGBTQ+ people and families, who are living every day in uncertainty and fear...It’s also incumbent on our allies across the country to stand with us and make it clear that they won’t sit idly by while extremists attack and malign LGBTQ+ people and our families." Friends - our safety is directly linked to our representation in our government. With more LGBTQ+ visibility and more voices heard on a national stage, we can ensure that these laws and the bigotry that creates them are shunned out of public light. | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, and thank you for being a part of this movement. ▪ Mia | ▪ | Mia ---|--- ©2023 Mia Mason for Congress | 1597 bowis dr, po box 124, Point of Rocks, MD, 21777 | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59e3605e1ec644a999ab70dc931007d2&_e=1e3BPLbafB_i_2OYn12jpdVwrVsnbFYQ9nwrU8LPA66bbCblqv5axOBB-32GP3Tbn_s2FJC4OjV12cWvsPhfG3WM6wDIa_YOKaOUrOPDbODk4-Wi_gQMaGbgJJuDD8RDMCABAkOK8Yv892Ynn_2J8eWcLyKQtnCkdgIJxmNC_aUtOsU7r8FKRihWlqcBSxzUVpAYqlrwea6IO6iyfexijuFQM-J5tp5gAfZGA1rMYxvAxtbrykufBnaoGzRFnMpOV5nadv7i9uc6ax-NfGsnxH4g8LnehIMFpkE1YlfDE9vbQtdXzJWTbytgRpAuFcDGgzaKSkMYvuENL4z9KnhdOaOrlGhAyAg5QmTOXjJus69jZLbnw8-Rt5HQnetkNxV4zj6YGmF-Idfy-QQw1fUt5fEOoXkhtECS5amPtvRIjnI%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59e3605e1ec644a999ab70dc931007d2&_e=1e3BPLbafB_i_2OYn12jpdVwrVsnbFYQ9nwrU8LPA66bbCblqv5axOBB-32GP3Tbn_s2FJC4OjV12cWvsPhfG3WM6wDIa_YOKaOUrOPDbODk4-Wi_gQMaGbgJJuDD8RDMCABAkOK8Yv892Ynn_2J8eWcLyKQtnCkdgIJxmNC_aUtOsU7r8FKRihWlqcBSxzUVpAYqlrwea6IO6iyfexijuFQM-J5tp5gAfZGA1rMYxvAxtbrykufBnaoGzRFnMpOV5nadv7i9uc6ax-NfGsnxOIpC3Fmyst4sed3E48n5gTSCRNqs4Ru_-ZLVtHr37HKK_t7pWIeyrho_Z2l4Hz1VBZqBjdZ0A7NNsMXHihKKBgT_fGm5FabYzDflQvkMpZTco5SCx5HWwSZp6oTxrPxfnWqG9hT8cVsOTq-R8T1fhc%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59e3605e1ec644a999ab70dc931007d2&_e=1e3BPLbafB_i_2OYn12jpdVwrVsnbFYQ9nwrU8LPA66bbCblqv5axOBB-32GP3Tbn_s2FJC4OjV12cWvsPhfG3WM6wDIa_YOKaOUrOPDbODk4-Wi_gQMaGbgJJuDD8RDMCABAkOK8Yv892Ynn_2J8eWcLyKQtnCkdgIJxmNC_aUtOsU7r8FKRihWlqcBSxzUVpAYqlrwea6IO6iyfexijuFQM-J5tp5gAfZGA1rMYxvAxtbrykufBnaoGzRFnMpOV5nadv7i9uc6ax-NfGsnxJqQ7dYsjmt-PWJas_N0DgaK0rOm33ES3m3YAJrkP9PL1fYE6-IbJfEda2jLYvojTZr90gbSbMDkXEUBQpjbnpXcaZilnqLcP4qenm4wnILB4S-Dn0_GVR987qpNqw8hyALUuyAzJYgqXjxV-2xTp9U%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger ... _
...We broke fundraising records. 3 independent polls showed us beating Joe Biden by 7 POINTS. In fact, polls show I'm the _ONLY_ Republican who can beat Crooked Joe.
**So, after a _state_ prosecutor _failed_ to break us, the Deep State sharpened their attacks and unleashed a FEDERAL prosecutor to TRY and take us down.**
_But let me be as clear as possible:_
**No matter how viciously they attack me, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left - and I will NEVER end this presidential campaign that puts YOU first.**

Friend,
I have been summoned to appear at a federal court in Miami, Florida on Tuesday, June 13 at 3:00 P.M. for the SHAM indictment by the Biden-Harris Department of Justice.
Details of my arraignment are still developing... As reported by _Forbes:_
“It is likely Trump will be arrested, booked and taken into custody before he appears before a judge...DNA samples are sometimes taken from federal defendants so they can be profiled...”
While there are still many uncertainties concerning Tuesday, one thing remains certain: **_my resolve to save our country has only gotten stronger._**
What the Biden Department of Justice has done to me is downright un-American – and I will fight this until the end to ensure we PREVAIL.
I could throw in the towel tomorrow, close down my 2024 presidential campaign, and all charges against me would magically be dropped!
But I wouldn’t just be turning my back on our campaign. _I would be turning my back on our country._
Because if the Deep State can get off scot-free with threatening its single biggest opponent, then America will be lost forever.
And I could NEVER turn my back on America.
America has given me the world: a beautiful family, a wonderful life, and the chance to give back to the USA.
_Mark my words: I will save this country if it’s the last thing I do._

clean_body: # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # # | | | Friend, I have been summoned to appear at a federal court in Miami, Florida on Tuesday, June 13 at 3:00 P.M. for the SHAM indictment by the Biden-Harris Department of Justice. Details of my arraignment are still developing... As reported by Forbes: “It is likely Trump will be arrested, booked and taken into custody before he appears before a judge...DNA samples are sometimes taken from federal defendants so they can be profiled...” While there are still many uncertainties concerning Tuesday, one thing remains certain: my resolve to save our country has only gotten stronger. What the Biden Department of Justice has done to me is downright un-American – and I will fight this until the end to ensure we PREVAIL. I could throw in the towel tomorrow, close down my 2024 presidential campaign, and all charges against me would magically be dropped! But I wouldn’t just be turning my back on our campaign. I would be turning my back on our country. Because if the Deep State can get off scot-free with threatening its single biggest opponent, then America will be lost forever. And I could NEVER turn my back on America. America has given me the world: a beautiful family, a wonderful life, and the chance to give back to the USA. Mark my words: I will save this country if it’s the last thing I do. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Instead, they are lining up for a sideshow of culture wars and enriching their corporate donors. Pennsylvania deserves a helluva lot better than this. And don't forget, Bucks County is a must-win for any presidential candidate. clean_body: The GOP presidential primary is heating up, and it’s starting to look more like the circus is in town. 🎪= Ashley Ehasz for Congress | = Hey, The GOP presidential primary is heating up, and it’s starting to look more like the circus is in town. 🎪 If you lost count, three more clowns announced they are entering the race for Republican Ringleader this week: Mike Pence, Chris Christie, and Doug Burgum. 🤡🤡🤡 Of course, the other side isn't focusing on the real issues impacting working families in our country — the rising cost of everything, abortion access, and climate change just to name a few. Instead, they are lining up for a sideshow of culture wars and enriching their corporate donors. Pennsylvania deserves a helluva lot better than this. And don't forget, Bucks County is a must-win for any presidential candidate. So grab your popcorn, because no matter who wins, the circus is coming to Bucks County and MontCo in 2024. | = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being part of our people-powered campaign. disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64661688/410826779/-1560980197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhhYmY2YS01ZjA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6P9lp3qTE-WOE3-cyP0nAUQQPJmq0loNlIGqOZrbYc=&emci=2799c621-1706-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=528abf6a-5f08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)

| | Hey there – When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ the results were immediate – and continue to be – catastrophic:
* **1 out of 3 women living in America** are living in a state where abortion is unavailable or severely restricted.
* In just the first two months after _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, **10,000 women were unable to access abortion care at a facility.**
* And right now, **24 states have already banned abortion care or are planning to do so. **

Know this – David Trone is going to fight tooth and nail to make sure fundamental reproductive rights like abortion are protected. He’s pushed to codify abortion rights into federal law as a member of Congress – and he’ll carry on that fight in the Senate. But we also want to hear your perspective. **Should Congress vote to protect abortion rights nationwide? ** [**[YES]**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64661689/410826780/-1560980197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhhYmY2YS01ZjA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6P9lp3qTE-WOE3-cyP0nAUQQPJmq0loNlIGqOZrbYc=&emci=2799c621-1706-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=528abf6a-5f08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)** **[**[NO]**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64661690/410826781/-1560980197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhhYmY2YS01ZjA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6P9lp3qTE-WOE3-cyP0nAUQQPJmq0loNlIGqOZrbYc=&emci=2799c621-1706-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=528abf6a-5f08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)

clean_body: | | | | | Hey there – When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, the results were immediate – and continue to be – catastrophic: 1 out of 3 women living in America are living in a state where abortion is unavailable or severely restricted. In just the first two months after Roe v. Wade was overturned, 10,000 women were unable to access abortion care at a facility. And right now, 24 states have already banned abortion care or are planning to do so. Know this – David Trone is going to fight tooth and nail to make sure fundamental reproductive rights like abortion are protected. He’s pushed to codify abortion rights into federal law as a member of Congress – and he’ll carry on that fight in the Senate. But we also want to hear your perspective. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c83b3395c8f4f039f56817776046276&_e=tENYSk9yERQyDytRiVhTvZmU_QXUBDqq13-q3ZtknVT27dhqTu1dbZcr-Mb_N6MaFLbnkATvJnAks_Ei_Vpq09_9yZ-dxPrwVm2OcqYMIKKUsI34Kd65iFAksZpeKgvVAK31HNSDwwcbigBJa0I0cQ9GLv2UZECkgVYNNRdt3om3w6wTseqQBlp4ekq4x-DRE3KyOW1kpIu1g29vzffb0pSFBDSlVPkhVcfqV0o_s4jP4vPUH8LGU0hS68RW04nH) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c83b3395c8f4f039f56817776046276&_e=tENYSk9yERQyDytRiVhTvZmU_QXUBDqq13-q3ZtknVT27dhqTu1dbZcr-Mb_N6MaFLbnkATvJnAks_Ei_Vpq09_9yZ-dxPrwVm2OcqYMIKJXX1yDZ0ag8_zAk5QfNblG6doPVyTLhOWDjGExf6v75eS1Lbba6yD_qyQempLVHKiFXYQqejyODfNT0HiCDMyIVjqVax2fyGuuUm9owRIe9uJXj2_sxbySkrlOao8PINVbT5LlqyuSFgnLSqQ53SAm) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c83b3395c8f4f039f56817776046276&_e=tENYSk9yERQyDytRiVhTvZmU_QXUBDqq13-q3ZtknVT27dhqTu1dbZcr-Mb_N6MaFLbnkATvJnAks_Ei_Vpq09_9yZ-dxPrwVm2OcqYMIKItL07uOW9P1WqZQT89nZYnTnvfrp-tPYKxkEYESSSztT6Z6o3hkzFeFEVcD3fiUA9fyBbNlfH_7tN0mUgiQwuSEdy5hf4gKUcv68AjbaOFKZGmvXxE1WvdYjzJuGznjWgaFbFlVpmBmSUouGG_4vfT) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0c83b3395c8f4f039f56817776046276&_e=tENYSk9yERQyDytRiVhTvZmU_QXUBDqq13-q3ZtknVT27dhqTu1dbZcr-Mb_N6MaFLbnkATvJnAks_Ei_Vpq09_9yZ-dxPrwVm2OcqYMIKLFnk0cnIXl31Jx-IHWG_V4hpoZn67a-AJJ90y7xfEO-faJSBhFrGIUlBTwlkqApLTfzo356FbWcOyMAWqhuBO2QAQq-eUnDLsESUDW8fETccRf0emhKL76ZipcQaYs8BGRMvliZJmXVGv1zjvc4dgv)

clean_body: You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. | Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the New York Post , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says: "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Ty Rushing, Courier Newsroom
subject: Hi Peter 👋🏾
body:
Our team is celebrating Pride Month in true Courier fashion
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)
Hi Peter, my name’s Ty Rushing.
I’m a proud member of the Courier team and I serve as the Senior Political Editor of _Iowa Starting Line_ , one of our local newsrooms.
This month, our team is celebrating Pride Month in true Courier fashion—by uplifting queer voices and holding elected officials accountable for misinformation and political attacks on the LGBTQ+ community.
[**Give me a second and I’ll tell you more about our work, and how we’re playing a critical role in the larger fight against bad information.****However, if we’ve already earned your support, please consider chipping in so we can keep up this important people-first journalism through Pride Month and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230611?refcode=em20230611&refcode2=1089_120351_dqX-01&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)
Like a lot of places, Iowa has seen a drastic rise in attacks on our LGBTQ+ family and friends—I was front and center for a lot of that while covering the 2023 legislative session.
A lot of attacks are driven by state and local lawmakers who have pushed extreme laws targeting the rights of LGBTQ+ Iowans, especially people who identify as transgender or nonbinary.
Despite what these lawmakers and mainstream outlets would leave you to believe, these bills are pure **fear-mongering** , rooted in **misinformation** and**right-wing politicians trying to score cheap political points by punching down on vulnerable populations**.
**That’s exactly why our team at _Iowa Starting Line_ has been hard at work correcting the record. We’ve used our reporting to give a voice to LGBTQ+ students impacted by a slew of discriminatory bills including a ban on gender-affirming care for trans youth. We’ve also put Iowa lawmakers in the hot seat when they’ve used their position to push their own spiteful agenda.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230611?refcode=em20230611&refcode2=1089_120351_dqX-01&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)
**While calling out bad information is our bread and butter—that and memes against fascism—our reporters have also made a point of covering**acts of solidarity and support** for our LGBTQ+ family. We also cover community pushback against these attacks.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230611?refcode=em20230611&refcode2=1089_120351_dqX-01&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)
And guess what? When Pride Month is over, our dedicated news team will still be on the ground debunking the bad information and putting the spotlight on the people driving these attacks.
****Fortunately, we aren’t the only ones.** Courier Newsroom has local teams in eight states, providing the same kind of necessary, honest news coverage. But to power our entire news network and keep up this important work, we need your help.**
**[Grassroots donations from folks like you go directly towards hiring and retaining talented journalists—like yours truly—and spreading our stories far and wide. If you believe in our work, please chip in $5 now:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230611?refcode=em20230611&refcode2=1089_120351_dqX-01&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230611?refcode=em20230611&refcode2=1089_120351_dqX-01&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)**
Thank you,
Ty Rushing
Senior Political Editor, _Iowa Starting Line_
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1089_120351_dqX-01&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1089%2E120351%2EdqX-01)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWKMJzfDUN

A movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWKMJzfDUN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I am
enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will
only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future.

A
movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.
In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as
devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's
why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on
Presidential Selection.

By
completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as
possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand
the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue-views we
will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can
complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using
the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61901429:WKMJzfDUN:m:3:2532013465:D29D1E44D708662AD617348C929D92F4:r

Do you
think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College
works and its role in preserving free and representative
government?
YES
NO

For most
of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the
Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it
was considered essential to preserving free and representative
government.

But
today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an
attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This
movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because
of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with
a proper grounding in American civics-too many Americans simply
don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including
the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because
of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission
on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of
Americans in all 50 states.

These
efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of
our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online
courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American
Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide
with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets
popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding
documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and
guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of
charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including
American civics) to thousands of American educators and
homeschoolers.

Your
answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will
help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate
millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to
liberty-including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this
is especially important in this critical time for America's
future.

So please
share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National
Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon
as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can
take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61901429:WKMJzfDUN:m:3:2532013465:D29D1E44D708662AD617348C929D92F4:r

And after
you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting
Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since
1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty."
Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach
efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government
funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state
student grants or loans.

The
support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please
represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential
Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention-and for
your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWKMJzfDUN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWKMJzfDUN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Is this too honest?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We're honest about National Democrats holding off on endorsing until they see our fundraising numbers. That's not easy to admit.
#

Peter -
If you're anything like us, you get a lot of campaign emails filled with fake matches (yes, sorry, they aren't real) and over-the-top, sky-is-falling content.
Not us.
We're honest. Maybe too honest?
We're honest about National Democrats holding off on endorsing until they see our fundraising numbers. That's not easy to admit.
We're honest that a good fundraising report could make it harder for Senator Sinema to raise money and stay in the race.
And we're honest when we say we're short of our goals right now and the only way to get there is lots and lots of donations.
So we're asking you to donate $3 to Ruben today. Because it actually will tangibly make a difference. The above is the 100% straight truth about our campaign.
What do you say, Peter? Help Ruben win this race. What we do in this deadline will go a long way:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate today? Your $3 will lead to more endorsements and make it harder for Senator Sinema to raise money on her own.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230611-1-full&t=1&akid=696%2E734936%2E-zGtnM)

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=696%2E734936%2E-zGtnM). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=27&refcode2=696_734936_-zGtnM&akid=696%2E734936%2E-zGtnM)
clean_body: We're honest about National Democrats holding off on endorsing until they see our fundraising numbers. That's not easy to admit. Peter - If you're anything like us, you get a lot of campaign emails filled with fake matches (yes, sorry, they aren't real) and over-the-top, sky-is-falling content. Not us. We're honest. Maybe too honest? We're honest about National Democrats holding off on endorsing until they see our fundraising numbers. That's not easy to admit. We're honest that a good fundraising report could make it harder for Senator Sinema to raise money and stay in the race. And we're honest when we say we're short of our goals right now and the only way to get there is lots and lots of donations. So we're asking you to donate $3 to Ruben today. Because it actually will tangibly make a difference. The above is the 100% straight truth about our campaign. What do you say, Peter? Help Ruben win this race. What we do in this deadline will go a long way: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. We mean that. Honestly. Ruben Gallego for Senate Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Giffords.org
subject: Imagine this...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must keep moving forward together
#

Friends -
Imagine a world without gun violence.
Imagine a world where we can go to grocery stores, concerts, nightclubs, and our places of worship without fear.
Imagine a world where our children can go to school without the fear of gunfire.
This future is within our reach. But to get there, we can’t give up hope, even on the hardest days of this fight.
As Gabby always says, we must keep moving forward together. It’s the only way we can stand up to the gun lobby and achieve a future where our communities are safer from gun violence.
Can we count on you to stand with us to create this better future?
[**Please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. Any amount helps us in our fight to save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230611-1-15&t=1&akid=5942%2E3935704%2ELM-OTv)

subject: re: Supreme Court and Social Security >> -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Supreme Court to hear a case that could "threaten to END" Social Security!**

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230611-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230611-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11020%2E9716520%2Edb9pn4)
**We urgently need to know where you stand:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230611-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230611-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11020%2E9716520%2Edb9pn4)

---

It's clear, team: With _Roe_ overturned, **_NOTHING_** is safe from the _ultra_ -conservative Supreme Court majority.

**And now, they're about to hear a case that experts say could _"threaten to end"_ Social Security!** **_65 million Americans_ could LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t let the Supreme Court attack this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we need to take action -- _now._ We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support Social Security. _But we’re still 38 responses short in Pennsylvania!_

**Please answer before midnight:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230611-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230611-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11020%2E9716520%2Edb9pn4)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: My recent telephone town hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I’m inspired to continue delivering results and advocating for my community’s needs.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664336/410836775/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230611-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGQ1YzBhOTYtNjMwOC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YeNCTjwdqmF2YZujU57cfC3jGhcvTRvO38vsrlAG2-I=)

| Peter, Earlier this month, I had the privilege of hearing directly from Virginians about the issues affecting their lives during a telephone town hall. I am always eager to hear from my constituents, and holding regular town halls gives me the opportunity to speak with people about the issues that matter most to them, and help prioritize my initiatives in Congress. I heard many concerns, from safeguarding LGBTQ+ rights to expanding broadband internet access across our rural communities. I’m grateful to the thousands of Virginians who took time out of their evening to share their thoughts with me, and these conversations help inform my work going forward. I’m inspired to continue delivering results and advocating for my community’s needs. [_**With that in mind, please consider contributing to my campaign so I can continue my advocacy and pursuit of results for Virginia families.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664337/410836776/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230611-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGQ1YzBhOTYtNjMwOC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YeNCTjwdqmF2YZujU57cfC3jGhcvTRvO38vsrlAG2-I=)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=922a34f525f64da38b57ab5dab03d531&_e=MrNeEdUMr6u1AAZe_PI51fHV9DL3Ju1Lwo7XWlqADpb4gAQYw205E0UJg2TUmQfIExJSG_HFARnKShvnC1Sl8lRAU5AjdxRAc22XhLf0tQGjE4M1LHtMvmHCNoa4jhZGv9Gg3Dhl6e_2ZPnhp8ASWG9-r99gIH8Dga_MbUqxo5E12vJd2OrlQ5H6UM14y_4LGld6joaqHY6dEWVwHDBw4BZWUxHZOXw95Khwf-t-0dspaOkBmSg06jQVgXP-ZXc-SRC8F7bbk5JvUR_vP4M7UvkZMH1f9IIsxEzWPKPVTiPPJqJ4RjzK11UtptOJ4KlaTbR7uKr_h2uOhxZ3fSYGiLv1ThE4t3NybUb2fHXQBO_qXGk3-LA-WNS1ZuL3F5nIRHSW6lJH-v0UjaWtwgMvg_s7OGhwjL2GNewXoFrMFPE%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=922a34f525f64da38b57ab5dab03d531&_e=MrNeEdUMr6u1AAZe_PI51fHV9DL3Ju1Lwo7XWlqADpb4gAQYw205E0UJg2TUmQfIExJSG_HFARnKShvnC1Sl8lRAU5AjdxRAc22XhLf0tQGjE4M1LHtMvmHCNoa4jhZGv9Gg3Dhl6e_2ZPnhp8ASWG9-r99gIH8Dga_MbUqxo5E12vJd2OrlQ5H6UM14y_4LGld6joaqHY6dEWVwHDBw4BZWUxHZOXw95Khwf-t-0dspaOkBmSg06jQVgXP-ZXc-SRC8F7bbk5JvUR_vP4M7UqjpNeXy2ACDlHaQRf7RVFBTQoLYZ1QgiBHw6s7QUTZCuATPTklB_eOuziqQaV1zf76l1x4yaG37BAq8Sd_aHqP3sZYVJGopMhT5wxp6nn81yoRq4iI8SMTEZvGnGxiLlGLzBxjc3UMDdrQ8nXfHqDI%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=922a34f525f64da38b57ab5dab03d531&_e=MrNeEdUMr6u1AAZe_PI51fHV9DL3Ju1Lwo7XWlqADpb4gAQYw205E0UJg2TUmQfIExJSG_HFARnKShvnC1Sl8lRAU5AjdxRAc22XhLf0tQGjE4M1LHtMvmHCNoa4jhZGv9Gg3Dhl6e_2ZPnhp8ASWG9-r99gIH8Dga_MbUqxo5E12vJd2OrlQ5H6UM14y_4LGld6joaqHY6dEWVwHDBw4BZWUxHZOXw95Khwf-t-0dspaOkBmSg06jQVgXP-ZXc-SRC8F7bbk5JvUR_vP4M7UkDYvPXGNpicfjv6gwFQT4W1KFEZWijxfz12WfMi-d1-DGX50lksSQFmrzH6r4MXr_xht-TF3n-tkKfd9PfgoqIQO7Ku0S5K6GE0NMRsMISc5-YjCrmX45gdlAUE0jVNXbvoCyGuC5UYFdL7p8hBYio%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Fair Fight
subject: Open for Brian Kemp’s record as Voter Suppressor in Chief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Let’s take a look at just a handful of Brian Kemp’s worst offenses as the Voter Suppressor in Chief. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664801/410838775/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230611_f_hallofshame3_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODJhZGRiZS02NDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJfNYXXXQXRjyklzd91YyHYoLpl2JdcuVNqTmow1c0U=&emci=928a8995-5808-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d82addbe-6408-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Brian Kemp has solidified his legacy as the Voter Suppressor in Chief. In his tenure as Secretary of State and Governor of Georgia, Brian Kemp’s egregious agenda has severely restricted access to the ballot box, serving as a playbook for other GOP leaders who are scheming to do the same. His goal is clear: Maintain GOP power and reverse progress by silencing Georgians’ voices — especially Black, brown, and young voters. In his latest attempt to diminish our democracy, he signed legislation to allow Republican takeovers of county Boards of Elections, removing democratically appointed members. **Let’s take a look at just a handful of Brian Kemp’s worst offenses as the Voter Suppressor in Chief.[_Then, if you’re able, please chip in any amount to support Fair Fight and help stop his future attacks in Georgia._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664802/410838776/518075514?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230611_f_hallofshame3_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODJhZGRiZS02NDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJfNYXXXQXRjyklzd91YyHYoLpl2JdcuVNqTmow1c0U=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664803/410838777/518075514?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230611_f_hallofshame3_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODJhZGRiZS02NDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJfNYXXXQXRjyklzd91YyHYoLpl2JdcuVNqTmow1c0U=) **As Secretary of State from 2010 to 2018, Brian Kemp:** ❌ Said he was concerned with Democrats “registering all these minority voters;” ❌ Investigated a Black city commissioner who assisted a first-time voter in understanding how to use voting machines; ❌ Oversaw canceling more than 1.4 million voter registrations; ❌ Put 53,000 voter registrations on hold before the 2018 election, nearly 70% of which were Black voters; ❌ Advised counties on how to close precincts and polling places, resulting in Georgia counties closing a total of 214 polling locations — a higher percentage closed than in any other state. **As Governor of Georgia from 2019 to today, Brian Kemp:** ❌ Signed SB 202, after expressing that he was “frustrated” with Democrats’ wins in the 2020 election. It has imposed burdensome voter ID requirements, criminalized handing out food and water to voters in line, permitted mass voter challenges, placed unnecessary limits on ballot drop boxes, and given Republican legislators the power to take over county Boards of Elections; ❌ Signed SB 441 to allow the Georgia Bureau of Investigations to investigate allegations of voter fraud and election crimes, feeding into Donald Trump’s false claim that the 2020 election was stolen; ❌ Signed SB 222, which criminalized hardworking elections officials and denied them necessary funds for our elections; ❌ Signed SB 92, which created a state commission to target and remove democratically elected district attorneys; ❌ Signed three pieces of legislation in 2023 alone aimed at taking over county Boards of Elections — removing lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats from their ranks. This includes HB 422, which allowed the Republican-led Ware County Commission to remove a Black Democrat from the Board of Elections and appoint a majority white board of elections. **As Georgia continues to play a critical role in the national political landscape as a battleground state, and as Democrats continue to win big in Georgia elections, we can expect that Brian Kemp’s voter suppression attempts will only intensify.** Fair Fight is laser-focused on mitigating the impacts of Brian Kemp’s assaults on our democracy, and that means building a full-scale organizing effort ahead of the 2024 election cycle. We’re gearing up to fight back against his future anti-voter attacks — ensuring all eligible voters can access the ballot box freely and fairly and helping elect pro-democracy champions up and down the ballot. And that’s why we’re asking you to help keep our efforts going strong. [_**If you’re feeling fired up about Voter Suppressor in Chief Brian Kemp’s extremist record, and if you’re committed to stopping him from silencing voters, will you rush a donation to Fair Fight today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664804/410838778/518075514?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230611_f_hallofshame3_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODJhZGRiZS02NDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJfNYXXXQXRjyklzd91YyHYoLpl2JdcuVNqTmow1c0U=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64664805/410838779/518075514?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230611_f_hallofshame3_v1s1_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODJhZGRiZS02NDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJfNYXXXQXRjyklzd91YyHYoLpl2JdcuVNqTmow1c0U=)
---
Thank you for being in this fight,
The Fair Fight Team

It has imposed burdensome voter ID requirements, criminalized handing out food and water to voters in line, permitted mass voter challenges, placed unnecessary limits on ballot drop boxes, and given Republican legislators the power to take over county Boards of Elections; ❌ Signed SB 441 to allow the Georgia Bureau of Investigations to investigate allegations of voter fraud and election crimes, feeding into Donald Trump’s false claim that the 2020 election was stolen; ❌ Signed SB 222, which criminalized hardworking elections officials and denied them necessary funds for our elections; ❌ Signed SB 92, which created a state commission to target and remove democratically elected district attorneys; ❌ Signed three pieces of legislation in 2023 alone aimed at taking over county Boards of Elections — removing lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats from their ranks. This includes HB 422, which allowed the Republican-led Ware County Commission to remove a Black Democrat from the Board of Elections and appoint a majority white board of elections. As Georgia continues to play a critical role in the national political landscape as a battleground state, and as Democrats continue to win big in Georgia elections, we can expect that Brian Kemp’s voter suppression attempts will only intensify. Fair Fight is laser-focused on mitigating the impacts of Brian Kemp’s assaults on our democracy, and that means building a full-scale organizing effort ahead of the 2024 election cycle. We’re gearing up to fight back against his future anti-voter attacks — ensuring all eligible voters can access the ballot box freely and fairly and helping elect pro-democracy champions up and down the ballot. And that’s why we’re asking you to help keep our efforts going strong. = | = Thank you for being in this fight, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT

name: Hung Cao
subject: Lessons from war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | Fellow American, It’s CAPT Hung Cao, retired U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer. I spent 25 years serving in some of the most dangerous corners of the globe, and here are the top three lessons I’ve learned.
---
**🇺🇸 Your mission is only as good as your team** **🇺🇸 You can push your mind and your body further than you think you can****🇺🇸 America is worth fighting for, no matter how tough it can be**
---
No one loves America like I do. You see, I was born in communist Vietnam where my family was put on a kill list for speaking out against the tyrannical, communist rebels. So when we were lucky enough to legally come to the United States, I dedicated my career to defending the country that saved our lives. **But now, the radical Left is destroying the American Dream that I owe everything to - and I won’t stand by idly while they do it.** And just like my missions in the Navy, I can’t finish this fight alone - I need you to stand with me and join this fight. It pains me to ask this, but America is worth fighting for, no matter how tough it can be. So I'll just say it- **[will you help us meet our midnight deadline by chipping in just a few bucks before 11:59pm?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5b615e162e2c4de592aab77c64d716a3&_e=G7IeCi_d3fHv11MtR6d2_s9RtUsVVQhnl9oECuxk0rU8jWSbedovgy5-C_4Yf-vgZgDbAYIea6tq2MjNjNvb79wMPw2fdgDDRuCItgxpBxQzVEUf1rw8-pNDibfRoS_0P8QBCpmOBVo8rQdPWTDYeEi1OU3ADxBwhdWgHrEF0pCQRm79-nUxpz-gut5n4wzEhYAxJrFuoxSBYiIB2aNwNfEHSoStQkA65Z0FEh3S4QQz_kP3jyfO1SCX6BN5tnG_3u3EWMKZASsjis8lKWhYdoOC60-hc4Kz9W30r5yLdJihHfVZ3dhN6eRZ3J28KU-Dj2Ym0GdmlWmBnn3NsjY1u5d6jvG4Yemd0cRvPXlJQ8-dti3Bp8TEICNq3WpHVEXV-lsxKefMMXPK32_Hxo9krtqa21BCrvCgGxcNSHIFkC8%3D)**
