subject: Be Brave, Do Something - Upcoming Events
body:
Our Republic Requires Good People to Do Something! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5014db2dbc3d/be-brave-do-something-upcoming-events?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
_**The team of 2WINCT will curate and amplify events worthy of your attention and participation. Our Republic requires good people to be brave and do something - Dominic Rapini, Board Chair**_
**Tuesday, June 13 (this Tuesday), 7 p.m:**
**"Liberty Scorecards for Connecticut Legislators?"**
Kimberly Fiorello has connected with citizens in New Hampshire who have been keeping liberty scorecards for nearly 20 years. This will be a how-to session on organizing here in CT. This will require a committed group of volunteers to track bills, but it can be -- and is being – done with positive effect to our north.
| [Register for Liberty Scorecards](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=a294a94718&e=8763c56857)
---

**Thursday, June 22, 5 p.m.:****"Grassroots Leadership Academy:**
**How to Sell Freedom without Starting a Fight."**
Lester is from the Grassroots Leadership Academy. He and his associate Meghan Norton will lead a 90-minute interactive training session on how to CIVILLY share principles and the causes of liberty and freedom with family, neighbors, and community. Here is the link to register:
|
---
| [Register for Grass Roots Academy](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=cec936757a&e=8763c56857)
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.
###
| | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=96a64cdc04&e=8763c56857)| [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=d2996bf6f4&e=8763c56857)

name: Patriot Announcement
subject: How should we elect the President
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb

This sponsored message from Patriot Announcement is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l6CnQaCs9TlFgH9IYBbTFQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRmaI7eP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NjROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1QQS0yMDIzMDQyM1cDc3BjQgpkf9zehWQ9p7kNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l6CnQaCs9TlFgH9IYBbTFQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRmaI7eP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NjROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1QQS0yMDIzMDQyM1cDc3BjQgpkf9zehWQ9p7kNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l6CnQaCs9TlFgH9IYBbTFQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRmaI7eP0SyaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NjROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1QQS0yMDIzMDQyM1cDc3BjQgpkf9zehWQ9p7kNUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Patriot Announcement
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: ~~ For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: ~~ And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Patriot Announcement PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~

name: Colin Allred HQ
subject: Did you see what Ted Cruz said about this race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we're fired up
| **BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight"** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47154?t=6&akid=8250%2E878179%2EDbmBmg) Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.

**There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – _and he knows it._**

Polling showed more Texans _disapprove_ of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.

**We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, friend:**

[Please, rush $5, $10, or any amount you can spare to split between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project so that we can compete with Ted Cruz's massive war chest. Every dollar will go toward our fight to flip Texas blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47154?t=7&akid=8250%2E878179%2EDbmBmg) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47155?t=8&akid=8250%2E878179%2EDbmBmg)

Team Allred

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8250%2E878179%2EDbmBmg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8250%2E878179%2EDbmBmg).**

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgtrhsjinjffrrck87basuovrlrqfqd16cpnc3cg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuh6psusc5g5q2qat05hcc5de8d3pen420rmedp8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmjt69u44u9d2ckfa9ugt1gu9a72iupcbf5o4q10_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zchvics0qe2puco27p7vqhr331holaqlltfptjsg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5gi1j7f7tjkmfboctu45r4v4oeov7ddo8sst1mg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zri7if7vo9a1u601gr7hv8aodojmmh771jag3o2g_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpnll40u83qood85hh9iq67uq43rs3fitheldbho_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpv06lpoj6c62uibspmo52631pph51b6l8b26i28_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zds5ig4g8mjavdbjo3gr1o08afe578291qgjpqk0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z07iiu9pdcj40mlp3dunfk2pijlh6unq0igm0ge8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsob2ohos6tmttcmmas4gi6eopas0pq69qtrd8u0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrmjbnvt6bn9fb25qenkaakpl51geq3tiq5m1t80_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7h07mqv7bsa6pfoi48r7b6i4jr4mlb8qvpem8m8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkhh7o1srdjau891g6tqdnikd9jo60bl7aijs3ko_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpso7ghssgemob2ggvtfv7h415h3ski1341kteio_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36chh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: BREAKING: INDICTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
A BIDEN-APPOINTED FEDERAL PROSECUTOR HAS INDICTED ME.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8489osvbaslr7lr11ndc5rjdcq4lvf8c8b88rm0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cli60o36c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger..._
...We broke fundraising records. 3 independent polls showed us beating Joe Biden by 7 POINTS. In fact, polls show I’m the _ONLY_ Republican who can beat Crooked Joe.
**So, after a _state_ prosecutor _failed_ to break us, the Deep State sharpened their attacks and unleashed a FEDERAL prosecutor to TRY and take us down.**
_But let me be as clear as possible:_
**No matter how viciously they attack me, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left – and I will NEVER end this presidential campaign that puts YOU first.**
With YOUR support, we will once again surge even higher and prove that our America First movement truly is UNSTOPPABLE.

subject: Re: The first Black congresswoman from Pennsylvania:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Summer Lee was able to overcome $4 million in attacks from outside groups. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvPrlB5M6GB3RF5IJY-DdfwPxSwsbYkNne9hlt58X5k4RGjJZEGkFbtrMJ43VxTtslrE1JTaC6jfmDMky4I9MTFY7u-ygQ0EHwrHMjO7ibnb0s_GnpRWORfRUzq4V9q2dGSLbv0Tu1KWdArIu2l08TqGcSnsR6HNAR39GDn7ylQJ5mhkyKqJNjJLR1TuZuCuVjI5CQeIepzKDAkepWYmELsgg10Ni6NKC0eDDYIBMpG28/3wy/bG46DBj5QneYvyO33Kwapg/h0/l18FjFNhgKxXtWFikp1UymQzDxCc_VhxIBaYnCehyUo)

Friend, Last year AIPAC pumped millions of dollars into Democratic primaries to defeat progressives―particularly Black and brown women who are willing to stand up to the unjust status quo. One progressive who was able to overcome $4 million in attacks from outside groups was Summer Lee. But it wasn’t easy. **These relentless attacks cut Summer’s victory in Pennsylvania to just 740 votes after leading by 25 points just weeks before her primary election.** **Now, Summer is up for re-election and she needs our help.** [**Can you split a contribution between my and Summer’s campaigns today to send us back to Congress to fight back against a status quo that others marginalized communities and attempts to silence strong progressive women of color?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rN3LXcCRrvuPS9i3hss7lLkW4vVEvtouWm10WIjppD0OFwPmoKFj4iA0y1h5bJE8U7yDr8GVo95WP_tNMB-9x_2HFG7s-MmCuLehmQp1zxezJdEDdTyL3shkeEJhe5C7Ct_9fwsZVADClz2wA-SF-O6FMwxFK_BNWbJQHE7TxRmDMPEWgHqP_oLRYVmGT9DGW8RfeeowSwpsjZ7iFmMbPrBbtxNpfK3FOGc6mF5jK1B2CQ-PXU8A3R6R4migVppRVdKLHZO4_lQZi2SIZPKoul3cah9jyuMlITaIvjCFPCex9q2JsFjXlY7YKImCJYrWx4Fg8-0tdxdwbRypiNXSYCFIxgAFO5r7AifGAZqQShtkM/3wy/bG46DBj5QneYvyO33Kwapg/h1/h5ywaZPfruvrGikQaZkVcovZCqpVuC2UDeLB4YoAZaw) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rN0yC92BXtM5KD0xOhytOV6sHHab3pQtLeuQAx8PfYzYtdztUUAbXgLdElxDAzFjbM1gNNObWwqZgV9KsJLnd2539DlfWGye3tk6eCJyOpEMs7MZ1i8y0je2UCkqh1zwWNN9tnX1Stk2QfHNsTQTCqcj7kaZktjYdC6-GgacX7M5MhE7X5QExX9pI0l8HC4XKyu5IZGu91Db7tp0RFFGJwzpes6Iy6gw9G_uT5YSHZOk8kF8HXv-QpCTWdZ5LOV5bV4m2ZdWF_A_Jw0qbHA45wHrc4_1Tomq9eUBLAyuTaABMLqVJe5WVOZTpn9FX-Uv1fmoIlqr4u06VPg5CJuJ1Ju0zDJyxZkt1GKc3plTt_ttrCCj4QNb6qkzjkr2zmg_2UEsGt5uJW5hwke_Zo_cg4HtmO_0QwKw72LGQTovZSU9I/3wy/bG46DBj5QneYvyO33Kwapg/h2/9clwKxQdApIcGXt8BcmLF7d2HTdoXbmObUktj3h73e0)

In just her first 5 months in Congress, Rep. Summer Lee has distinguished herself as a critical progressive ally, fighting back against right-wing hate and the unjust status quo.
This month, I stood side-by-side with Summer as we both voted against a Republican-led budget that rewarded Kevin McCarthy for GOP hostage taking. Summer has stood by my side in our shared struggle for the rights of marginalized communities―from LGBTQ+ rights to Palestinian rights. Summer hasn't backed down in fighting for climate justice.
**Last year, Summer overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from outside groups, including AIPAC, to become the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress.** Now, she’s preparing for her first re-election campaign and an onslaught of special interest attacks, which want to silence Summer and other strong women of color.

clean_body: Summer Lee was able to overcome $4 million in attacks from outside groups. | | | Friend, Last year AIPAC pumped millions of dollars into Democratic primaries to defeat progressives―particularly Black and brown women who are willing to stand up to the unjust status quo. One progressive who was able to overcome $4 million in attacks from outside groups was Summer Lee. But it wasn’t easy. These relentless attacks cut Summer’s victory in Pennsylvania to just 740 votes after leading by 25 points just weeks before her primary election. Now, Summer is up for re-election and she needs our help. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | | You always have my back. Together, let’s have Summer’s back and strengthen our progressive power in Congress. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jun 10, 2023 Subject: The first Black congresswoman from Pennsylvania: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In just her first 5 months in Congress, Rep. Summer Lee has distinguished herself as a critical progressive ally, fighting back against right-wing hate and the unjust status quo. This month, I stood side-by-side with Summer as we both voted against a Republican-led budget that rewarded Kevin McCarthy for GOP hostage taking. Summer has stood by my side in our shared struggle for the rights of marginalized communities―from LGBTQ+ rights to Palestinian rights. Summer hasn't backed down in fighting for climate justice. Last year, Summer overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from outside groups, including AIPAC, to become the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. Now, she’s preparing for her first re-election campaign and an onslaught of special interest attacks, which want to silence Summer and other strong women of color. Before being elected to Congress, Summer already had a proven track record as an organizer and state legislator who has fought against corporate greed, systemic racism, labor exploitation, and environmental dangers. One of Summer’s top issues is environmental justice, because her region suffers from some of the worst air quality in the country. Like me, her priorities include fully funding the replacement of all lead water lines—and ensuring that clean air and water are treated like the human rights they are. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=982438a4570db368b42e9c19d2abf02780d6bb1e6100a557813143d545f115ef1075d4d2180c28dc6d9554bcccf58892975673190f49309548bf1cb188471da8
DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO JOIN TEAM DESANTIS

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=982438a4570db368cec71fa4da4f82a2c93430288f8d4de96f8b9c9800e235d559582afac5818ff491d3eb5c44665a99cd2c39d7ff4acdc9f188614fae4bd7c9

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Becca Balint
subject: [WATCH] "Do you really believe this garbage?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667743/410850448/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=&emci=40b58bc2-6d08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5b5d796c-6e08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667745/410850449/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-graphic-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=) **On the House Oversight Committee, I tore into an ex-Trump official after her attempt to bring bogus attacks on trans kids into a hearing on clean energy. Yes,_clean energy._** What do trans kids have to do with a committee hearing on energy? _Nothing_. But whether it’s on the Oversight Committee, Budget Committee, or dozens of other subcommittees, Republicans continue to obsess over trans children in every single conversation – using them as a new political boogeyman to mobilize far-right extremists behind their hateful agenda. **This Pride Month, I’m going toe-to-toe with MAGA extremists hellbent on eradicating queer youth and the LGBTQ+ community. In the face of increasingly personal and violent attacks, we will not back down – _but we need your support._[Please watch my latest exchange on the House Oversight Committee, and then pitch in a donation to have my back as I fight to defend LGBTQ+ Americans and trans kids in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667746/410850450/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=)** **[Watch + Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667748/410850451/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=)** I am the first woman and LGBTQ+ person serving Vermont in Congress, and one of only 11 openly-LGBTQ+ legislators in the House of Representatives. While I will continue to speak loudly and proudly against the bigoted rhetoric and lies being hurled at the LGBTQ+ community – during Pride Month, no less – _I cannot do it alone._ **I’m counting on the grassroots support of Democrats across the country to stand with me and fight for the most vulnerable members of the queer community, especially kids. [Donate anything you can afford today to help us continue to stand for the rights and freedoms of LGBTQ+ Americans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667749/410850452/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667750/410850453/683709638?express_lane=true&refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=)** | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64667751/410850454/683709638?express_lane=true&refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVkNzk2Yy02ZTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=60Uw_VGQOG0ZYPVnRmOPVjkPhkJRI_FZQpdSo3nk4d4=)**

clean_body: I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria. | | Peter, I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria: = On the House Oversight Committee, I tore into an ex-Trump official after her attempt to bring bogus attacks on trans kids into a hearing on clean energy. Yes,clean energy. What do trans kids have to do with a committee hearing on energy? Nothing. But whether it’s on the Oversight Committee, Budget Committee, or dozens of other subcommittees, Republicans continue to obsess over trans children in every single conversation – using them as a new political boogeyman to mobilize far-right extremists behind their hateful agenda. This Pride Month, I’m going toe-to-toe with MAGA extremists hellbent on eradicating queer youth and the LGBTQ+ community. In the face of increasingly personal and violent attacks, we will not back down – but we need your support.= = I am the first woman and LGBTQ+ person serving Vermont in Congress, and one of only 11 openly-LGBTQ+ legislators in the House of Representatives. While I will continue to speak loudly and proudly against the bigoted rhetoric and lies being hurled at the LGBTQ+ community – during Pride Month, no less – I cannot do it alone. I’m counting on the grassroots support of Democrats across the country to stand with me and fight for the most vulnerable members of the queer community, especially kids. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25148%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yCgEHtdu22YIuYZe8wS1eg&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25148%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yCgEHtdu22YIuYZe8wS1eg&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25149%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aDJ08qB91HZlEzcoY4LReg&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25140%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wW1I7ak6JFdELHFu2i%2bjUQ&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25141%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wn6GwGdLFc%2bMK4yFScCKIA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25142%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cMKZpGWcN20g5PsB%2bmZ9lg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25143%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=73tGjb2AK2NVhv7eSi6R8A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25144%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZvB%2ferUH3f2oR%2f%2b5m%2fM7uQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25255%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1PHtFmejsiuxEu3XiOtVaA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25256%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xSJ4MwsOxVJ4rFjPyZApkA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25257%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hru4NjEwfHGArRQc08xRwQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25258%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2bqIq7O1AbSuyaSZPgj0pQ&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25259%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rUgq%2fll%2bxeYT48X1sSzuFw&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25250%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XI7D7JGghsNwQ7I5fzV3Bw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25251%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JKLoYeHTwNR%2b%2bjQ6NND%2fvQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Your America News

name: Katie Porter
subject: Already thinking about June 30
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
As a single mom of three, planning ahead is the only way we’re getting through the week. I bring that same energy to the campaign.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24580%2E3422442%2EXzCefI)
As a single mom of three, planning ahead is the only way we’re getting through the week. I bring that same energy to the campaign.
We have an important end of quarter deadline coming up on June 30th. So while that’s still a few weeks away—I’m already anxiously watching to see whether we’ll raise what we need. [**Can you be one of the first supporters to donate towards our end of quarter goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230611-1?refcode=EMAI11_1_EOQ_20230611_V1_F&refcode2=24580_3422442_XzCefI&akid=24580%2E3422442%2EXzCefI)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230611-1?refcode=EMAI11_1_EOQ_20230611_V1_F&refcode2=24580_3422442_XzCefI&akid=24580%2E3422442%2EXzCefI)**
At the end of June we’ll have to publicly report how much we’ve raised over the past three months. **Last quarter, we were outraised by another candidate in the race, but recent polling has us pulling ahead with voters.** That means the number we report next month is absolutely critical. I want to send a strong message to the super PACs and special interests watching this race. They’re deciding if they’re going to spend big against us—let’s show them it’s not worth it. [**Can you make a donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230611-1?refcode=EMAI11_1_EOQ_20230611_V1_F&refcode2=24580_3422442_XzCefI&akid=24580%2E3422442%2EXzCefI)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230611-1?refcode=EMAI11_1_EOQ_20230611_V1_F&refcode2=24580_3422442_XzCefI&akid=24580%2E3422442%2EXzCefI)**
Thanks so much,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI11_1_EOQ_20230611_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=24580_3422442_XzCefI&akid=24580%2E3422442%2EXzCefI)**

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: Disgusted by Young Kim’s voting record on guns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Friends,

Just like you, I am so sick of gun violence in America. This year alone, our country is at yet another record pace for mass shootings.

Moreover, I am absolutely disgusted by the fact that Young Kim consistently votes against gun reform legislation in Congress.

Friends, I’m running for Congress to represent CA-40 to ensure that we put a STOP to gun violence in America because let’s be honest, we can’t afford to continue to live like this.
Can you donate whatever you’re able to today friends, and help me stand up to the NRA endorsed Young Kim?

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.11_B1_GunViolence

Almost every week, we hear of a shooting that takes away the lives of innocent Americans in schools, places of worship, shopping centers, nightclubs—no place is safe from a mass shooting in America.

And I’m frankly just tired of our politicians’ “thoughts and prayers” to the victims and their families. It's an ad lib pretense that doesn't do anything to solve gun violence.

Why can’t we actually PASS common-sense legislation that stops this gun carnage?

Because MAGA party staunches like Young Kim make it impossible for gun reform legislation to have a chance.

Just last year, she voted against the Assault Weapons Ban and the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act.

Young Kim has made it clear that she’s not going to do anything about gun violence.

That’s one of the reasons why I’m running here in CA-40. We can’t just let this endemic gun violence to continue. If you're able to today friends, can you pitch in whatever you’re able to afford and help me flip CA-40 blue?

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.06.11_B1_GunViolence

Thank you for your help. We have to do EVERYTHING we can to end gun violence in America, friends.

– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress

Tustin, CA 92781-9998

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Last week in my district in Glendale, California, a routine school board meeting turned violent when an anti-LGBTQ mob rioted outside of the school.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y)
Derek, I need to be clear about something:
**We are facing the most coordinated, sustained backlash to LGTBQ equality in our lifetimes.**
Last week in my district in Glendale, California, a routine school board meeting turned violent when an anti-LGBTQ mob rioted outside of the school.
These continued acts of violence and hate toward our LGBTQ community — especially toward students, parents, and teachers — are horrific.
All of our children deserve to **feel** safe and **be** safe regardless of who they love or how they identify. The coordinated legislative maneuvers and outright violent attacks to threaten and intimidate transgender children and their parents in particular are unconscionable.
**We will not go back. We will not apologize for celebrating the strength and diversity of our LGBTQ community.**
I’m an original cosponsor of the _Equality Act_ , and in the Senate, I’ll vote to abolish the filibuster so we can pass it with a simple majority once and for all.
**[Add your name and join me as a citizen cosponsor of the _Equality Act_ to say: We won’t go back, and we will fight like hell to defend the LGBTQ community from violence, intimidation, and outright discrimination no matter what.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230611-equality-act.t71LQF&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230611-equality-act.t71LQF&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y)
---
This is a matter of principle. This Pride month, it is each of our responsibility to stand with our LGTBQ community and keep moving forward until we have achieved the true equality that is the birthright of every person in our country.
Thanks,
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2477%2E5257348%2E71Uu2Y)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Majority Leader Mitch McConnell?!
body:
Republicans want you to ignore this
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62be1df6-4fe3-4b6a-823e-90066c86c4ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.** _Imagine waking up Weds, November 6th, 2024, and reading that headline. **[You won't wanna do that right after eating. Or, EVER.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc141bbdf-8afd-4401-9427-30c1ea206c77/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_** ** So, I'll keep this brief: **Senator Jon Tester reminded us in an email** , recently, everywhere he looks he sees one of **" the most vulnerable"** or one of **" the most likely to flip"** when political pundits describe his seat. _Tester represents a very red state. He's been able to hang on his past two re-elections because he's the real deal, from a multi-generational farming family in Montana and about as regular a guy as can be. _ From his recent email: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td398c81b-83ee-469f-9311-ea49cd49d7f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**This isn't just talk. It's who he is. But, that doesn't change what he's up against,** **that ****he's put his seat at risk for us,**** to vote for smart, progressive legislation Republicans will use to attack him.**_ **_Once more: Majority Leader McConnell._ **If we ever say that again it means our democracy is in danger and we've lost one of our best Senators, Jon Tester. [**_So can you join Blue Amp right now in sending Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td82820ae-0d61-4c7e-a0c2-d0bb924735fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us keep the Senate, keeping Jon Tester there and keeping Mitch McConnell as far away from leading it as possible._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6f07bdb-54ad-46bd-bbba-c51aeda7b4b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Fairness Project
subject: INSIDE: Our roadmap to preserving abortion access →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
After the fall of Roe v. Wade last summer, abortion bans came down all across the country. Now, 12 states have active abortion bans on the books.
[[U.S. MAP shows all the states where abortion is banned]]

In November 2022, 5 states had abortion-related questions on the ballot — including 2 backed by Fairness Project. Each and every one of these campaigns won and safeguarded abortion in their states for good.
[[U.S. MAP shows all the states where abortion is protected + emphasizes California, Vermont, Michigan, Kentucky, Montana]]

NOW → 10 states remain where we could use ballot measures to restore access to abortion. Some even, are states where a voter-driven ballot measure could cancel out an active abortion ban!
[[U.S. MAP highlighting Arizona, Arkansas, Florida, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma and South Dakota.]]

BUT, some anti-abortion extremists are coming after ballot measures themselves as a way to stop a vote on abortion protections from ever reaching the ballot:
[[Newspaper clipping: The Columbus Dispatch: Is August election about abortion? Secretary of State Frank LaRose says '100%' When Secretary of State Frank LaRose first unveiled a plan to make it harder to amend Ohio's Constitution, he said it was bigger than any one issue. Republicans have since made it clear the proposal is aimed squarely at hampering a ballot initiative to enshrine abortion access in Ohio.]]

We’re fighting back against these attacks AND powering our next slate of campaigns to preserve access to abortion. Will you rush a donation to power our work?

[[DONATE NOW]] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21675-20230611-AbortionAllGraphic-graphic-Other-GraphicPicOnly-NA-NA&amount=25

Your support allows us to make this progress possible.

Each and every one of these campaigns won and safeguarded abortion in their states for good. [[U.S. MAP shows all the states where abortion is protected + emphasizes California, Vermont, Michigan, Kentucky, Montana]] NOW → 10 states remain where we could use ballot measures to restore access to abortion. Some even, are states where a voter-driven ballot measure could cancel out an active abortion ban! [[U.S. MAP highlighting Arizona, Arkansas, Florida, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma and South Dakota.]] BUT, some anti-abortion extremists are coming after ballot measures themselves as a way to stop a vote on abortion protections from ever reaching the ballot: [[Newspaper clipping: The Columbus Dispatch: Is August election about abortion? Secretary of State Frank LaRose says '100%' When Secretary of State Frank LaRose first unveiled a plan to make it harder to amend Ohio's Constitution, he said it was bigger than any one issue. Republicans have since made it clear the proposal is aimed squarely at hampering a ballot initiative to enshrine abortion access in Ohio.]] We’re fighting back against these attacks AND powering our next slate of campaigns to preserve access to abortion. Will you rush a donation to power our work? [[DONATE NOW]] [] [] [ to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. DONATE [] DONAR [] Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. [] You can request to get only the most important emails from our team here [] , or you can unsubscribe: .Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project P.O. Box 21337 Washington, DC 20009 United States

The truth is that this race will be tough. The attacks will be nasty, brutal, and downright deceitful. And all of our hard work will amount to a hill of beans if we don’t have the resources to fight back.

I pride myself on making Washington look a little more like Montana – it all comes back to helping your neighbor. I’m in this race to ensure that folks across the country have food on the table, good-paying jobs, and the freedom to make decisions for themselves without out-of-touch politicians getting in the way.

We still have work to do to make this country work for everyone, but we won’t make any progress if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. **That’s why I need your help to keep me in the Senate delivering results for Montana families.**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Support President Trump in the Face of a Double Standard
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
There is a different standard for Republicans vs. Democrats when it comes to the handling of classified information and prosecution in the courts. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)
---

Fellow American,

**President Trump is being treated unfairly and we should stand our ground.**

An independent prosecutor is now coming after Trump over the handling of classified documents at Mar-A-Lago.

It's only fair to ask: Did the Department of Justice charge Hillary Clinton for the private server she had in her home? Did the Department of Justice come after her staff for mishandling electronic files that ended up on the computer of a convicted felon? They absolutely did not even though the cases were quite similar.

Meanwhile, classified documents were found in Joe Biden's garage from when he was Vice President and without the power to declassify, and the _DOJ looked the other way._

I won't even get into former President Bill Clinton who lied under oath in a civil trial and had his law license suspended. Was he charged in court for perjury or other crimes? Not a chance.

And let's not forget the Hunter Biden laptop fiasco.

_But with President Trump, anything goes. It is all about one thing - Get Trump._

This double standard is crystal clear.

This is a continuation of the Left's unprecedented political persecution of President Trump and their latest attempt to derail his campaign for President in 2024.

We need to continue our strong support of President Trump to show him we are with him. We need you on this team - [**will you stand alongside President Trump and make a contribution of $5, $10, or even $100 to help him fend off another attack?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)

[** SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)
President Trump is continuing to fight these charges, and we need him to know we support him. [**Will you chip in at least $5 to fight back against political persecution in the courtroom?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)

Fellow American, this is more than just making sure President Trump continues to victory in 2024; it's making sure that the Left doesn't continue to unfairly pit the justice system against conservatives and Republicans.

[**Let's show the Trump -haters this injustice won't stand by supporting President Trump.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)

Thank you,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)
Lindsey Graham

[** SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907897:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61907898:WM1qnfD6N:m:1:877327319:C8002E39D2526ECBA7870C9190881885:r)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Maximum sentence: “400 years in prison”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I never thought this could happen in America.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYH8BwwcOGRrcYnUSj20US_R7HhIJsIGgSna_fQVUbbX33savZ8Gwjzy8NGJ-k1ofWe_Cq2FOQmtz-Xb5bs9_z67_NfPU507W5X7kepvQuv0MdP_6utKQQF4PGjtMt9pbDRiRp2yja2klJXJ7t3QGAQ01BoAW5HGcqgtVr5V9VBWssm401IbaZVSVpVKFqAaMu1Qy_caZGVLUcqdY-GnCKN_pGULc4FTyMbuntK8Pif1Qvcr4bZQsXNcyB-Ng8FfyiHQwgj5Y-KY8mGLfgFeOd5ynELglIiE7iOOiKDQo22oVmTfW2H6LYVrIM9bEMa9fO0B12lbkIRxyFd4MYQwA9-iMO7L6SuZYqKYhHGtkY3Q9hpH9sK4S3867Rs9rH_C50eMaz5_XLbzn0_Ils7PO48jr7YWpbwdCw63fwEAAP__LE2N7Q)
---
Friend,
Reports state that I could receive a maximum sentence of **400 YEARS IN PRISON** despite being a totally and completely innocent man.
I honestly cannot believe I just typed those words to you.
It sounds like something Stalin or Mao did to eliminate their opposition.
But instead, it’s happening here in America. Communism has finally come to our shores.
We are no longer living in the country of Washington and Lincoln.
For the first time in American history, the federal government has used its prosecutorial powers to charge the _leading_ opponent of the current regime.
_**While today is certainly grim and dark, do NOT lose faith!**_
As I said once before...
_“With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.”_

clean_body: I never thought this could happen in America. | | | Friend, Reports state that I could receive a maximum sentence of 400 YEARS IN PRISON despite being a totally and completely innocent man. I honestly cannot believe I just typed those words to you. It sounds like something Stalin or Mao did to eliminate their opposition. But instead, it’s happening here in America. Communism has finally come to our shores. We are no longer living in the country of Washington and Lincoln. For the first time in American history, the federal government has used its prosecutorial powers to charge the leading opponent of the current regime. While today is certainly grim and dark, do NOT lose faith! As I said once before... “With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.” | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. subject: I hate to do this…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, I really hate to bother you on a Sunday, but we are just 19 days away from the end of the quarter and it is so crucial that we hit our fundraising goal before June 30! | | | Hey Peter,I really hate to bother you on a Sunday, but we are _just 19 days away_ from the end of the quarter and it is so crucial that we hit our fundraising goal before June 30!**[Can you chip in today?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d6382bd0102943ee8b570ddc2b583673&_e=GwAtdrr82_C4Dgs9zeY0_f4fzcZc0AErZA6H3ScDWN4_p99Y6mJSk2ntd0oqOUCV7D9naKhWUK6lNB0ExP9ECseLqA6AdUnkemGMHjsEuREtE8SanoVWLP1jbiRE5p_XvO4yekqK164FkcZ35z5_-XeAbNQa1MMZUq81TPWamuVEvC6-V1AWeDEz097wsJLIRSKxxTTdpRXaKO152Z8pTrp2WNctt7IW4rj3JlWl7DPKyWsG94ucvGmT-EpQL6aSbSA37mWf0LbQm9j4toj3sN9zBlUX0uqkbT6wAMycPu6AlZP98I3VleydCJ96qLKvntlVFAgE6JusWJf2QOUUlkVi5DKLoL76jGkcXqd4SqEGrrctPqQhSDSuEndXDX1RA8hS4hDMdQ9cjbqFJJ63QbWxuf2_Sz5R7nWjQ3lkIlY%3D)** I just had a meeting with Emily and the entire team to crunch numbers, and we are falling way behind schedule in hitting our goal for the end of the quarter. Ensuring we hit our goal this quarter is crucial to proving to John James that he is vulnerable and we are a force to be reckoned with.We only have 19 days to catch up – **[can you rush in $19 to ensure we are back on track to hitting our big end of quarter goal?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d6382bd0102943ee8b570ddc2b583673&_e=GwAtdrr82_C4Dgs9zeY0_f4fzcZc0AErZA6H3ScDWN4_p99Y6mJSk2ntd0oqOUCV7D9naKhWUK6lNB0ExP9ECseLqA6AdUnkemGMHjsEuREtE8SanoVWLP1jbiRE5p_XvO4yekqK164FkcZ35z5_-XeAbNQa1MMZUq81TPWamuVEvC6-V1AWeDEz097wsJLIRSKxxTTdpRXaKO152Z8pTrp2WNctt7IW4rj3JlWl7DPKyWsG94ucvGmT-EpQL6aSC0NT27cKY2q48j2XnPtw04Aa9Pzns5LJW4avZn0AaURKG5qKbrCTsZyrJR2Ghs86YzFB_HvpNIj1M881Vd5Dk1anzo09szZEo4jCL5tE-l4ypSKNDlw1Sbzt6QXFDC15G46ab2vPJdHECjEEDj--QcMcz4vkZg5iRue2zFdglDII0nJgH4qV-PSuvOopg-Ro)** After June 30, we have to release every single cent and dollar we’ve raised, and John James and the MIGOP will be anxiously waiting for our report. That is why this is crucial. We also don’t have any big lobbies or wealthy extremists to back us, so we really have to catch up organically.I know we can do it, but we need all hands on deck to achieve this goal – so are you with me? **[Chip in now if you are ready to send a message to John James that Michiganders are ready for change!](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=d6382bd0102943ee8b570ddc2b583673&_e=GwAtdrr82_C4Dgs9zeY0_f4fzcZc0AErZA6H3ScDWN4_p99Y6mJSk2ntd0oqOUCV7D9naKhWUK6lNB0ExP9ECseLqA6AdUnkemGMHjsEuREtE8SanoVWLP1jbiRE5p_XvO4yekqK164FkcZ35z5_-XeAbNQa1MMZUq81TPWamuVEvC6-V1AWeDEz097wsJLIRSKxxTTdpRXaKO152Z8pTrp2WNctt7IW4rj3JlWl7DPKyWsG94ucvGmT-EpQL6aSbSA37mWf0LbQm9j4toj3sP1-Hcxf5jmt8tf6b9KDOJqCIAN4eM238bF1mt8uFQb25f2NRQQLmKa8zEsHAdf5FOrXjh2copKZiML9mnvixUAhegZicys3xBvUvwVSDHbvHFtbuw_w10HuKZAH9KAjCOeSnfPRsv1xRXzULRE0sPo%3D)** Thank you so much,

Peter,

Today marks the beginning of our first full month since launching our 2024 election bid:
**RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT **
In May, we raised over $8.2M because of over 40,000 generous donors. **This month, we want to prove how much your support means to us. **

**Our team has decided to build a giant donor wall with the names of our first 100,000 donors (that includes our first 40,000 donors already). Not because we don't enjoy our beige walls but because when we say you 're a part of this team we mean it - your support is the foundation of our campaign.**

Every day when our team is in the office, we think about the mission and the people across the country who have chipped in because they're focused on it with us. We take that responsibility and that trust very seriously, and we want everyone who works here to see it.

**[So with that in mind, why wouldn't we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b96d8d7163fd4456b8a74b27a3069dde&_e=0fIPLcpD5ZRU-5DQ7HuTiDPFq5lXdLX6lh1bHGKAyPSFNvUodE-XWZ6iFGoYKq3TXF93WBXQWDCtYzOkY85p9ISrkVqzsop1dm96tv57ETBhSR7DycUskRax2bDyJ0J-YKtENarVOy8WlA5eINW0gC1Shcr82HaZa-1EHz6mfkrhpmyMNi2Hvw5HCL-4FeLAd5qixBrcYsFKyarTdQxKJAMNWBMXZF9OdgNU8UKqc6ch25Sx1b-inVyzDPTj1zzQTJaSPSKvJBLQsp7w5StW_s4v_USIanLCpNLcrJysh1V7_kNGXxSljY6eIr7pKaI16kJ0d3488ajuBToJhPPwZWiRsKM9QEd_-sPF6FWe-515r7LhHx5PaN_Z6eY9qeb-E25JbRMhb4cTOpkSGy4l3g%3D%3D "So with that in mind, why wouldn’t we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?")

Don't believe us? **

**We 'll be pushing out live updates weekly so you can see how your support holds up the walls of our home base. **

Peter, we have pledged to you to never lose sight of our mission -- to achieve our Great American Comeback. Despite what the woke mob will tell you, **STEP 1 is building the resources we need to win this election.**

We are so excited to see your name on our walls here at HQ. **[Chip in ANY amount you can today to leave your mark on what will be an unprecedented moment for our nation.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b96d8d7163fd4456b8a74b27a3069dde&_e=0fIPLcpD5ZRU-5DQ7HuTiDPFq5lXdLX6lh1bHGKAyPSFNvUodE-XWZ6iFGoYKq3TXF93WBXQWDCtYzOkY85p9ISrkVqzsop1dm96tv57ETBhSR7DycUskRax2bDyJ0J-YKtENarVOy8WlA5eINW0gC1Shcr82HaZa-1EHz6mfkrhpmyMNi2Hvw5HCL-4FeLAd5qixBrcYsFKyarTdQxKJAMNWBMXZF9OdgNU8UKqc6ch25Sx1b-inVyzDPTj1zzQ0ucM1LSNeiqXpzjj0IFeA9jPOUvpXJyqV47Yew5NcqGa08Ykbe_Sg9npGaN1CXDDZkhbGWZGLkfOBZXt8GhwzyltjCOoRdMS4Vrj48csRWqLKwLPkoASHWZFWwdqwEHPGhokyuO9anfJKDtClroe_g%3D%3D "Chip in ANY amount you can today to leave your mark on what will be an unprecedented and historic moment for our nation.")**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
