| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b96d8d7163fd4456b8a74b27a3069dde&_e=0fIPLcpD5ZRU-5DQ7HuTiDPFq5lXdLX6lh1bHGKAyPSFNvUodE-XWZ6iFGoYKq3TXF93WBXQWDCtYzOkY85p9ISrkVqzsop1dm96tv57ETBhSR7DycUskRax2bDyJ0J-YKtENarVOy8WlA5eINW0gC1Shcr82HaZa-1EHz6mfkrhpmyMNi2Hvw5HCL-4FeLAd5qixBrcYsFKyarTdQxKJAMNWBMXZF9OdgNU8UKqc6ch25Sx1b-inVyzDPTj1zzQLZ9FBoL9A0fdxtFODx6InFtKXDMpyJV01SXmCGOO_LYoW8jL-04KZ7fc_DyC-dwCgTzdT2oKm9Qz_7BTLcdp_NBQG-4wcUIgUc2gZVee9WsY08_VV9_Jq8eVThStycWHA-wNS6-KiH-4MOXwTHG_BA%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25275%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yONxVT4bYNO149GvgxoQCQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25276%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ssjOfJYMeyV7LdBTejLHCw&sysid=1)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

| | Will you take our quick survey? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64670067/410858793/-2147054774?sourceid=1050177&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhiYzMzNS03NTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3Ji0lEksNGjmpoh5k1Xeock74Zh2OpqdquUvqBRCeM=&emci=7e7a31f9-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=808bc335-7508-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **We just lauched a survey to find out what our community thinks about Gov. Ron DeSantis and his presidential run. We need your input, Peter:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64670068/410858794/-2147054774?sourceid=1050177&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhiYzMzNS03NTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3Ji0lEksNGjmpoh5k1Xeock74Zh2OpqdquUvqBRCeM=&emci=7e7a31f9-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=808bc335-7508-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Before I started as the vice president of Digital at EMILYs List, I worked in Florida politics — so I've seen _firsthand_ the damage done by Gov. Ron DeSantis and his hateful agenda.

You're a supporter of Democratic pro-choice women, so you know as well as anyone that Ron DeSantis is one of the most dangerous forces in American politics today. His anti-choice, anti-democratic attacks on women, children, people of color, and LGBTQ+ folks are ceaseless, heartless, and devastating for Florida's most vulnerable communities.

As the head of the EMILYs List digital team, it's my job to keep you up-to-date on our organization's mission and priorities. And it's also my job to keep our team up-to-date with _you_ : What are _your_ priorities this cycle? What are you most concerned about?

**So, Peter, as we prepare to fight back hard against Republicans like Ron DeSantis and everything they stand for, we want to hear from you. Will you fill out this quick survey — and let us know what you think about the Florida governor and his right-wing extremism?** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64670069/410858795/-2147054774?sourceid=1050177&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhiYzMzNS03NTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3Ji0lEksNGjmpoh5k1Xeock74Zh2OpqdquUvqBRCeM=&emci=7e7a31f9-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=808bc335-7508-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thank you for your input,

Cayana Mackey-Nance (she/her/hers)
Vice President of Digital, EMILYs List

As the head of the EMILYs List digital team, it's my job to keep you up-to-date on our organization's mission and priorities. And it's also my job to keep our team up-to-date with you : What are your priorities this cycle? What are you most concerned about? So, Peter, as we prepare to fight back hard against Republicans like Ron DeSantis and everything they stand for, we want to hear from you. Will you fill out this quick survey — and let us know what you think about the Florida governor and his right-wing extremism? Thank you for your input, Cayana Mackey-Nance (she/her/hers) Vice President of Digital, EMILYs List | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Folks, this super PAC is going to try to convince voters to give Herrell another chance. You and I already know her dangerous record, but Gabe needs the resources to share it with New Mexico voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Gabe only beat Herrell by 1,350 votes last year. This rematch is predicted to be the tightest race in the country. Anything you can give to help us keep this TOSS UP seat blue is immensely appreciated! In thanks, Conor Campaign Manager, Gabe Vasquez for Congress | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. name: Brandon Wolf, Pulse Survivor
subject: The day my life changed forever....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,

I’m alive, but will forever be haunted by that tragic night at Pulse nightclub 7 years ago tomorrow.

Seconds before it happened, we were all dancing to the pulse of the thundering music from the DJ. My boyfriend Eric and I had just left our friends, Drew and Juan, to go to the bathroom. That’s when we heard the first gunshots.

People began piling into the red-tinted bathroom, the scent of blood clinging to their clothes. We thought we were going to die, crouching in terror in a bathroom stall. We huddled there until we were able to charge through the smoke toward the fire exit. We didn’t look back. We didn’t want to see anything. We just ran for that door.

Tomorrow will make seven years ago. I’m alive — I was one of the lucky ones, but 49 innocent, beautiful souls were taken. The hundreds of us inside Pulse couldn’t stop a murderer with the ability to buy an automatic assault rifle designed for warfare with a surplus of ammunition.

That’s why I joined the Board of Advisors for Pride Fund to End Gun Violence. Our mission is to turn tragedy into action through a focus on common sense gun safety reforms like enacting background checks and restricting access to assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. Our organization relies solely on donations from grassroots donors like you. This work is critical and I am asking for your donation. Friend, will you pitch in to help us save lives? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfpulse7yearsbrandon?refcode=2023&amount=25&recurring=yes

My best friends were failed by our political system. It failed the families of the 49 people who were killed, the 53 people who were injured, and all of the survivors like me who were permanently scarred by the attack. Politicians chose the gun lobby over public safety. The system failed me and it’s currently failing all of us. That’s why I need your help.

Let’s honor my friends, Drew and Juan, and the 47 others by taking action. Pride Fund is working to honor all of those whose lives were taken by senseless gun violence by standing up to the gun lobby, electing candidates who support gun safety laws and LGBTQ equality, and speaking out to save lives.

Friend, I hope you’ll join me in our fight to save lives. Click here to support our mission. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfpulse7yearsbrandon?refcode=2023&amount=25&recurring=yes

With appreciation,

Brandon Wolf

Pulse Survivor

Pride Fund Board of Advisors Member

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pfpulse7yearsbrandon?refcode=2023&amount=25&recurring=yes

To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? Sign up here.

Washington DC 20007 United States

name: Team Alex Padilla
subject: Alex wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hey there,
We know it’s a Sunday, so we won’t take up too much of your time.
But before you go enjoy the rest of your day, we hope you’ll take a minute to [**fill out our official June Supporter Survey.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/June-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230611-1-30&refcode2=1339.159979.dZD3Hy&akid=1339%2E159979%2EdZD3Hy) _It’ll only take a minute, and it will really help Alex make sure he’s prioritizing the issues that matter most to people like you._
Our records indicate that you haven’t taken one of our surveys before, so we wanted to reach out directly and ask for your input.
So whether it’s holding the Supreme Court accountable for corruption, making sure we respond to the climate crisis with the urgency it requires, protecting and expanding the right to vote, or something else entirely, **we want to hear from _you_ about _your_ priorities.**
[**Please use this link to fill out our June Supporter Survey. It would mean a lot to hear from you.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/June-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230611-1-30&refcode2=1339.159979.dZD3Hy&akid=1339%2E159979%2EdZD3Hy)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/June-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230611-1-30&refcode2=1339.159979.dZD3Hy&akid=1339%2E159979%2EdZD3Hy)**
We’ll be looking at the results and sharing them with Alex this week, so please get your response in today.
Thank you in advance for sharing your thoughts!
Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/June-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230611-1-30&refcode2=1339.159979.dZD3Hy&akid=1339%2E159979%2EdZD3Hy)**

## DeSantis Had It Bad In Tulsa
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22626365.12721.1.f05808cdb684d54afd9938d455d82af3)
---
**Ron DeSantis** traveled to _Trump Country_ yesterday and it was a **DISASTER**. I received _four text_ message invites from the **DeSantis superPAC** inviting me to attend a public event in Tulsa with the Govenor of Florida and Oklahoma. A very small crowd of a few hundred showed up and the energy level was low. **Govenor Kevin Stitt** made a statement that "**Oklahoma Loves DeSantis**!" The crowd response was brutal but what happened next caused my [tweet](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22626365.12722.1.236be69fec7569eb76018ccc96d98499) to go viral.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22626365.12723.1.6c87392b10b934fd48c7cd526e345330)
---
After the very awkward moment, **Stitt** endorsed **DeSantis**.
And in a room with no ac and a few hundred people **DeSantis** began to speak and _sweat_ big time.
The disastrous trip to Oklahoma for **DeSantis** co-aligns with the polling that came out today from **CBS** with **Trump** over 60% and **DeSantis** around 20%.
I lead [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22626365.12724.1.90ed60cfd18903087697a156c0074b47) and I can tell you that the momentum of the **Trump** campaign is growing every week.
**Donald Trump** will be the Republican Nominee and the 47th President of the United States!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Peter,

Rhode Island is a national leader in offshore wind development. Our Blue Economy consistently shows the rest of the country how we can cut energy costs, reduce emissions, and create thousands of good-paying, union jobs at the same time.

As a member of the House Natural Resources Committee, Seth is focused on how affordable, clean energy will continue to benefit the economy of Rhode Island and how we can share Rhode Island’s wind energy leadership with the rest of the country.

We must continue our investments in clean energy programs — because there is no alternative. This is about creating jobs with strong wages while ensuring that we leave a healthy planet behind for future generations.

[Will you take two minutes to share your opinion on clean energy by completing this short survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64672148/410865860/-73766989?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230611_SV_cleanenergy_0_6MO_SethMagazinerHQ_NA_NA_cleanenergy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQ3MzFlOC03YTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0l3Uqe0Bz_AHyiTtXYLGgFMRAd8s4CeN4Bs1h_R5Mk=&emci=ab7213e2-7a08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f8d731e8-7a08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

This is about creating jobs with strong wages while ensuring that we leave a healthy planet behind for future generations. | The GOP desperately wants to roll back all of the progress that Democrats have made to invest in clean energy. If they succeed, jobs will be lost and our progress will be erased. We need to keep investing in clean energy sources and pass more pro-climate legislation to ensure we leave a healthier planet for future generations. Thanks, Seth Magaziner HQ | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: A victory for voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
The Supreme Court just struck down a blatant racial gerrymander

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64672184/410866035/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230611MM_MM_JW_FULL_8_G_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE1YTBjYy03YTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5GAzzaFCKOmz8pKih-D0iRGzQP9Hvoab0QfkBMCh98=)
---
In recent years, waiting for the biggest Supreme Court decisions in the month of June has become a nail-biting and fear-inducing experience. That's why the court's ruling on Thursday regarding racial gerrymandering was an incredible relief. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64672185/410866036/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230611MM_MM_JW_FULL_8_G_N_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE1YTBjYy03YTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5GAzzaFCKOmz8pKih-D0iRGzQP9Hvoab0QfkBMCh98=) The Supreme Court found that Alabama's congressional map diluted the voices of Black voters — and in doing so, the court reaffirmed a critical portion of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) that has long protected majority-minority districts.

This is great news. But the threats to our democracy aren't going away any time soon (and it should be noted that we wouldn't have even been in this situation if the Supreme Court hadn't already severely weakened the VRA a decade ago). **We cannot allow voting rights to continually hinge on thread-bare decisions by an increasingly-politicized court.**

I've repeatedly voted in Congress to strengthen the Voting Rights Act and further reduce gerrymandering, and I'll never stop fighting to pass pro-democracy legislation into law — — and that's part of the reason Republicans are determined to defeat me. **[Can you help me hit my mid-month goal of $10,000 by chipping in $10 today? Every fundraising benchmark this summer is critical as I prepare for another tough race in VA-10.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64672186/410866037/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230611MM_MM_JW_FULL_8_G_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE1YTBjYy03YTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5GAzzaFCKOmz8pKih-D0iRGzQP9Hvoab0QfkBMCh98=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64672187/410866038/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230611MM_MM_JW_FULL_8_G_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE1YTBjYy03YTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5GAzzaFCKOmz8pKih-D0iRGzQP9Hvoab0QfkBMCh98=)**

clean_body: The Supreme Court just struck down a blatant racial gerrymander = In recent years, waiting for the biggest Supreme Court decisions in the month of June has become a nail-biting and fear-inducing experience. That's why the court's ruling on Thursday regarding racial gerrymandering was an incredible relief. = The Supreme Court found that Alabama's congressional map diluted the voices of Black voters — and in doing so, the court reaffirmed a critical portion of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) that has long protected majority-minority districts. This is great news. But the threats to our democracy aren't going away any time soon (and it should be noted that we wouldn't have even been in this situation if the Supreme Court hadn't already severely weakened the VRA a decade ago). We cannot allow voting rights to continually hinge on thread-bare decisions by an increasingly-politicized court. I've repeatedly voted in Congress to strengthen the Voting Rights Act and further reduce gerrymandering, and I'll never stop fighting to pass pro-democracy legislation into law — — and that's part of the reason Republicans are determined to defeat me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I'm working hard to help Democrats take the House in 2024 so that we can renew our push to fully restore the VRA. Every seat is critical in our fight for the House majority — and if the GOP wins my swing district, Democrats will be in a hole that we might not be able to dig ourselves out of. If my team hits all of our goals this summer, we'll be in a very strong position against any early GOP attacks and go a long way toward securing VA-10. So I'm counting on your help. = Thank you, Jennifer Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks—Everywhere you look, the media and political pundits say I’m one of the “most vulnerable” Democratic senators and this seat is one of the “most likely to flip” in 2024.
The target on our backs will only get bigger as we grow this campaign—Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will stop at nothing to take this seat and gain back their majority. So before I go any further, can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help me keep my seat and Democrats in control of the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
The truth is that this race will be tough. The attacks will be nasty, brutal, and downright deceitful. And all of our hard work will amount to a hill of beans if we don’t have the resources to fight back.
I pride myself on making Washington look a little more like Montana—it all comes back to helping your neighbor. I’m in this race to ensure that folks across the country have food on the table, good-paying jobs, and the freedom to make decisions for themselves without out-of-touch politicians getting in the way.
We still have work to do to make this country work for everyone, but we won’t make any progress if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. That’s why I need your help to keep me in the Senate delivering results for Montana families.
What do you say, folks? Can you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us win and keep the political pundit prophecies from becoming a reality in Montana? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
I appreciate your support so much—especially now. Early investments make all the difference, so thank you in advance.
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

clean_body: [] Folks—Everywhere you look, the media and political pundits say I’m one of the “most vulnerable” Democratic senators and this seat is one of the “most likely to flip” in 2024. The target on our backs will only get bigger as we grow this campaign—Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will stop at nothing to take this seat and gain back their majority. So before I go any further, can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help me keep my seat and Democrats in control of the Senate? [] Donate [] The truth is that this race will be tough. The attacks will be nasty, brutal, and downright deceitful. And all of our hard work will amount to a hill of beans if we don’t have the resources to fight back. I pride myself on making Washington look a little more like Montana—it all comes back to helping your neighbor. I’m in this race to ensure that folks across the country have food on the table, good-paying jobs, and the freedom to make decisions for themselves without out-of-touch politicians getting in the way. We still have work to do to make this country work for everyone, but we won’t make any progress if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again. That’s why I need your help to keep me in the Senate delivering results for Montana families. What do you say, folks? Can you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us win and keep the political pundit prophecies from becoming a reality in Montana? [] I appreciate your support so much—especially now. Early investments make all the difference, so thank you in advance. Jon Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . As a local of our state, she also decided to pursue her higher education here. Graduating from Northern Arizona University with a bachelor's degree before pursuing her master's from Arizona State University.

After completing her educational journey, Lauren began her career interning with the White Mountain Democrats in 2016. She furthered her experience in politics by working with Mission For Arizona during the 2020 cycle – helping to win Arizona for Senator Mark Kelly and President Biden.

Feeling a passion for grassroots organizing and working towards empowering others, she came to work for the Arizona Democratic Party.

As our Organizing Director, she believes that organizing can help our party create meaningful change. Lauren is so grateful that she can work towards a better future for her home state of Arizona.

– Arizona Democratic Party

name: Cori Bush
subject: RE: It’s time for reparations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Justice means reparations. | |
---
Peter, In my home state of Missouri, Black people are almost 5 times more likely to be killed by police compared to white people. In the U.S., Black people die at 3 times the rate of white people during childbirth. **Horrific disparities like these, along with the growing Black-white wealth gap, are all products of our country’s legacy of enslaving and dehumanizing Black people.** To achieve justice and heal generations of trauma, we need reparations. So I introduced the Reparations Now Resolution, which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility to provide reparations for the enslavement of Africans, as well as for the harm our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people. [**Please sign on today to become a grassroots co-sponsor of my Reparations Now Resolution.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARESxW-SfCWQTxs6vavuNyX40IQvOu6hnp9OJZhUKTzObSwH_j-7ec6iljuLwvLIcF86ZFKmx3oDnMvdnNBkS26pCvMO_wMwNT6NpHapD1we5faDwuKk7fHlJY9qaR1lv_cZtRsfjDSW_kiXLENvt35mw8VRNZcSD6gpaSO0VbdEi9Lk--NoySF3wWTx5haFYubdwcLrIwvz-C9X0yBgivs8_n3G8HFP8ODNOImqSJHPQqAc46OJuyyreKccANYBdSg6u4IX79YUR8Hk629yyWU5xvJ594gO0KwlyqGw9IemCi3MbhGIkak-EqH-4yDqyvyui1dDOpNPJVaTkocJoraCWzndSdE_ra1R9XkJz3h_gsaJQ-8JFD4JwWDik_RoZx32mbHnYZC4FHoosjfmimZzx6siboSKeV4V8zHVTKjHzHU_tINxzEBR3xXHzIIwfshds5sNqnBfgJgl-9_rp6ww/3wy/5Nu8NLERTnGaBokVpg94IA/h0/L2ABhWinZ47pXOdwu7l_q1XjNTyK7eCx_MCWrUyp29g) **[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARESxW-SfCWQTxs6vavuNyX40IQvOu6hnp9OJZhUKTzObSwH_j-7ec6iljuLwvLIcF86ZFKmx3oDnMvdnNBkS26pCvMO_wMwNT6NpHapD1we5faDwuKk7fHlJY9qaR1lv_cZtRsfjDSW_kiXLENvt35mw8VRNZcSD6gpaSO0VbdEi9Lk--NoySF3wWTx5haFYubdwcLrIwvz-C9X0yBgivs8_n3G8HFP8ODNOImqSJHPQqAc46OJuyyreKccANYBdSeKNO5TFrcq4aUSU0cmV_ep2AM6DrlK40Z60elLCFCDWdkbO6UD8OU49zXWTpDWWKASBIuPIhpv63JU2znECR4Cnahn04evMeYDqQaHgdgB9J18bZz72RqrqBvxV7hfsqBDbWwYkDIJcvXFNGJRk-yGtA9_3LF785fF8PBLnwNqrymlY8GQECM903v1bbus9ETQBeT8uaR9OFhZBNtPVoEg/3wy/5Nu8NLERTnGaBokVpg94IA/h1/6Y5CQC7RhjADSp123DJjv4cGQUW6_BP8FHJP8mhL2sk)** I’m proud to have partnered with grassroots groups on this resolution. Other policies I’ve introduced to address anti-Black injustices include bills that would decriminalize drugs, invest in non-carceral public health alternatives to policing, address the trauma of generations of police violence, and invest in the resources Black communities need after centuries of exploitation and disinvestment. Together, we will keep pushing for racial justice and Black liberation. name: Will Rollins
subject: Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64681282/410873299/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzIyYWM1OS04MjA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rHqAbkH1KMEDP7wZcAIvrbyZf6sVYqOqIq5qNyk_qNw=)
Happy Pride Month, Peter!

June is the month of brightest light in the northern hemisphere. It’s also when the LGBTQ+ community celebrates stepping into the light with pride in who we are and how far we’ve all come; in judging each other by our characters not by whom we love.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64681283/410873300/1321783056?refcode=em-6.11.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzIyYWM1OS04MjA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rHqAbkH1KMEDP7wZcAIvrbyZf6sVYqOqIq5qNyk_qNw=)
_My partner Paolo and I at Palm Springs Pride last year._
Like many, my partner Paolo and I came of age at a time when being gay was still considered a crime in many states. I often reflect back to when I was 17 years old in the months after 9/11. I had a deep sense of duty to serve the country, but policies like _“Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell”_ discouraged me from joining the military. Thanks to a lot of brave LGBTQ+ Americans who came before me and had the courage to come out, I eventually got the chance to work openly in law enforcement and counterterrorism.

We’ve come a long way, and I never imagined what Pride would mean for me today.

CA-41 is now home to Palm Springs, one of the largest and most vibrant LGBTQ+ communities in the country. Running to represent this city in Congress is an honor, and it certainly carries a weight of responsibility. Not to mention my opponent is Rep. Ken Calvert -- a man whose 30-year career has been defined by homophobia and opposition to LGBTQ+ rights.

There’s much to celebrate this month, but our fight isn’t over. We’re seeing a rise in anti-LGBTQ+ sentiment cropping up across the country -- whether it’s book bans, anti-trans legislation, or boycotts against businesses that prioritize equality.

This month, let’s recommit to standing up to those who seek to divide us. In Congress, I'll never stop pushing for equal protection under the law for every American.

Proud to have you by my side. 🏳️🌈

Will

Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64681289/410873321/1321783056?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzIyYWM1OS04MjA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rHqAbkH1KMEDP7wZcAIvrbyZf6sVYqOqIq5qNyk_qNw=)

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Upcoming Events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Sign up today
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012x43Eqdjp6prQ6vl-4nfUVTMnMu92DtT3NHvqz1DYOLAznSGroZ4ZdHiuVzrXl6ubrjtPA6ToVRtP5Oi__UK2VMBY9XvNAr-TK6zJxHVeLleQ3yYmJMKJKefdQUNummLsd-mNXAu5F8_5FIrQjgHikVwcLNCOeRFme0THtPiJZc=&c=cLHo2d3CRs2s0MIOamRJEjwIWtoIcl-aXza5m-coO9jYqgxlG2jNrg==&ch=vIi0i77d-A_iQK2XXkNokulJTpxVjYfZFEkBnuvFijmudG5JgO3beA==)
---
---
| Upcoming Events
---
| Volunteer this Week
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

Election Day is almost here. There isn't much time left, we need your help this week!

On Thursday, June 15, we have a Candidates' Forum with the Fraternal Order of the Police at 5821 Iron Bridge Rd, Richmond, VA 23234, at 6:30pm. Please let us know if you are interested in attending.

We are officially in Get Out The Vote (GOTV) mode. We have only one event scheduled for this week because we will be out knocking on as many doors as we possibly can. I'll be out walking every day this week and I need volunteers to join me. Sign up today for a morning or afternoon shift, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

Early Voting will be open on Saturday, June 17, at the local registrar's office. For Chesterfield residents, vote at 9848 Lori Rd. Chesterfield, VA 23832. For Colonial Heights residents, vote at 201 James Ave. Colonial Heights, VA 23834. And of course, on Tuesday, June 20, everyone votes at their usual local voting location. Please note, Saturday, June 17, is the last day to vote early.

We have an important need for volunteers to work at the voting locations on Election Day, Tuesday, June 20, from 6am to 7pm. Please sign-up today, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com). You can work your home precinct, or one nearby. We're hoping volunteers can help for 3 hour shifts. We especially need people in the morning from 6am to 9am and in the evening from 4pm to 7pm. We have over 50 locations to cover and it is very important that we have comprehensive poll coverage so please [sign-up today](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Quentin James
subject: a note from me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8b2F2EEkpTa_fwLN2tZ1PLlCIZBwR_z-txqwBfd7Qq04V6T4igasmjijPXyMkhsETvq52zxy7xOHRgZp0GQ-TvGJFp9tOvdCjgP8qUEcOuhSbLMvL8ByUw844Ug7MMsAP1zd18JHm0rMAMaaxqP6sqtlMFkt5WW4TcweosQyjJ32I-2vNRcC9Q7wTrlzyWsL1NIx_W8C1azn9fQKPD2945cYsYMSNBMBuHKYBGNyxSbm9raUMSpUEFIyhqezjXBbKbU17rr6XarrcjBk5Nq4k99lWcU0QTaIB3QZ7U7Z3nfl1mErDilksSuLLV1hbaPopCXogALzE1XOfJJhYvaxHR4/3wy/C0oiBt7HQlGCeuMA6Fxacg/h0/Xn8ro1EzjlpvS94Jdork_rSrd8RXY9NojMzQgrTUh_o) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cBAQGC3T3h9QR7fW8ucx_b0F3jbQD4EnuN-kT2uvq5Ew_Y94trG1Z9uBvirlFjbpbDrGyy_lpASiGsZ8R6k_Dzyqn59uncC-TgJOwiyx1zjjacmTBRaoNkqXdpuNdKzTxwxTFzl4sSIe6WZ3KNOb3YaTYSpglktQBxSKFN-TOPjZGtffokZrRLi7jgxBQCrdjwkZcGJtYDmookJfBffL_ux3iHBTy2quC-eS92HHy0DZytSl9a0XrClDrfcrJsZDPqlONv4tlx8UnfOagtVj3GQU1ueOUjdb32jp4pXeZ83g8Z8aUMDn0KEhQS74M-Iw_CUqs_cwfkG29eQh2ETwxOm3K2_bFgm1xPH4foiQhnER4MrWEWi3NeaChi9w8U8MfGicIvqArpqkMYiPTZ0avAitzMRyA-vWKk-PIKJ3MB7DGpLFUtQ-RLeObhUNhdfJoYtIeKBVbbBBibzR4pb50DRufB3S-XVIGlPJO4ar0cRk/3wy/C0oiBt7HQlGCeuMA6Fxacg/h1/mY5CErKvnPALmaM028vFZ-6RZvwSFjW5dlChbXXUEEQ) Peter,

We’re a week into June, and I need to check in with you.

Last week I told you that we needed to raise $80,000 in June. That means we need to raise roughly $20,000 per week to stay on track, and _we’re already falling behind._

I know that seems like a lot of money, and 2024 seems far away. **But here’s the thing: our mission to build Black political power is not waiting until 2024 and does not end with candidates at the top of the ticket.**

We’re getting involved in critical down-ballot races across the country — from state legislatures to mayors to city councils and even school boards, we’re putting in the work to elect Black candidates for local offices because our community deserves representation for the people, by the people.

So yes, Peter. This is a _MASSIVE_ goal. But this is what it takes to invest early, invest intelligently, and ensure Black Democrats across the country can win.

[Will you help our team make a difference in local races across the country by chipping in $10 right now? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cBAQGC3T3h9QR7fW8ucx_b0F3jbQD4EnuN-kT2uvq5Ew_Y94trG1Z9uBvirlFjbpbDrGyy_lpASiGsZ8R6k_Dzyqn59uncC-TgJOwiyx1zjjacmTBRaoNkqXdpuNdKzTxwxTFzl4sSIe6WZ3KNOb3YaTYSpglktQBxSKFN-TOPjZGtffokZrRLi7jgxBQCrdjwkZcGJtYDmookJfBffL_ux3iHBTy2quC-eS92HHy0DboIXNR3YtjMRpyTOyi544EBPknGtztsNk9-y2yNU7CbiaDgRn0QyWMLatkkJY33vXg2N_Q1RSo5wYm5IzrCXNfQFJeMj3yi2Kzemstb_pSRxdL12Lhv7vuh8gw5wivLFFfQ70dFcjz8Qh20HFRgTuQBg_FcZlXsZGng1J4SGuRU9Cp46UFoQ3NjVLVIokgXjSQDfPXmK_SPXd-cFHrYg75-pKugXzQLfEZq6yg5_zvrIAYoIzbZV9BoDHkToKmrhs/3wy/C0oiBt7HQlGCeuMA6Fxacg/h2/qQTtM3d2q3dZ5EF8yerSKdzmXqDnzGg_x08lfvkgalA)

Local offices make decisions that heavily affect our daily lives, and when those positions are filled with politicians that don’t belong to the communities they’re representing, our government fails its people.

That’s why we’ve put local races at the forefront of our work this year, endorsing candidates all across the country — from Auon’tai Anderson for Denver (CO) School Board, to Makya Little for House of Delegates (VA-19) to Kesha Hodge Washington for Phoenix (AZ) City Council. Supporting our endorsed candidates down-ballot in 2023 is critical for our work.

[Focusing on local elections is KEY to addressing the underrepresentation of the Black community in elected offices. Will you help us support our endorsed candidates across the country by donating $10 today? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cBAQGC3T3h9QR7fW8ucx_b0F3jbQD4EnuN-kT2uvq5Ew_Y94trG1Z9uBvirlFjbpbDrGyy_lpASiGsZ8R6k_Dzyqn59uncC-TgJOwiyx1zjjacmTBRaoNkqXdpuNdKzTxwxTFzl4sSIe6WZ3KNOb3YaTYSpglktQBxSKFN-TOPjZGtffokZrRLi7jgxBQCrdjwkZcGJtYDmookJfBffL_ux3iHBTy2quC-eS92HHy0DYCxetqcONWTB_HGX3M5pytJEtz5HNXXhRZmfVwoaafBL4nYF134KJpfLVLDFceFZLBApOgFhvS_MKjw0iapIeKFf3emlZAvs16lHefvgGK60sj91v4190b77eeAoK7yJeTbXukUyZrz3p_c5AVnidonyoaOtkGin3wkNP3dg_sD5z1MPqSlCQBiCnZ2k_KfyZ8OuBmEjf06v3Kxy9nUt_74aAvUIxCfiPbCV9Wdfbo1zd6Fgt9eSPxedMeHu-6ED8/3wy/C0oiBt7HQlGCeuMA6Fxacg/h3/DCf8BeIzx8srkziAsHWa86i0zuJEU0BL1DoJFHdaZhw) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, We’re a week into June, and I need to check in with you. Last week I told you that we needed to raise $80,000 in June. That means we need to raise roughly $20,000 per week to stay on track, and we’re already falling behind. I know that seems like a lot of money, and 2024 seems far away. But here’s the thing: our mission to build Black political power is not waiting until 2024 and does not end with candidates at the top of the ticket. We’re getting involved in critical down-ballot races across the country — from state legislatures to mayors to city councils and even school boards, we’re putting in the work to elect Black candidates for local offices because our community deserves representation for the people, by the people. So yes, Peter. This is a MASSIVE goal. But this is what it takes to invest early, invest intelligently, and ensure Black Democrats across the country can win. Local offices make decisions that heavily affect our daily lives, and when those positions are filled with politicians that don’t belong to the communities they’re representing, our government fails its people. That’s why we’ve put local races at the forefront of our work this year, endorsing candidates all across the country — from Auon’tai Anderson for Denver (CO) School Board, to Makya Little for House of Delegates (VA-19) to Kesha Hodge Washington for Phoenix (AZ) City Council. Supporting our endorsed candidates down-ballot in 2023 is critical for our work. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | None of this is possible without your support, Peter. Quentin James The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Wanted you to be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=aace598e1a&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | I wanted you to be the first to know that I am officially running for re-election to the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors and my brand new website is live [here](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=fcc6e33825&e=c0babbc643). I’m so proud of the work my team and I have done with you and countless members of the community over the last six years, but our work is far from done – we’ve made so much progress, but in some ways, the challenges the county faces are bigger than ever. As a fourth-generation son of San Mateo County and graduate of Skyline College, I care deeply about the residents of San Mateo County, as I have lived in this community and worked in this community my entire life. My priorities are:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

As you undoubtedly know, campaigns are not cheap, and mine is funded by grassroots donations from people like you. Early donations are by far the most valuable, as it shows how much support we have right out of the gate. Could you chip in to get us off to a strong start? Any amount you can give will help, from $5 up to $2000! [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=eafa1394b1&e=c0babbc643) Down the road, we hope we can also rely on you to help join the campaign in other ways like door-knocking, sending texts to voters and holding coffees so I can meet your neighbors. As always for me, this is a people-powered campaign, and I absolutely couldn’t do it without you! Best, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today helps us show strength in the early days of the campaign – I would be so grateful if you could pitch in now at [DAVIDCANEPA.COM](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=5519c4d7c5&e=c0babbc643)

Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463
---
|
---
| | |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Virginia abortion rights hang by a thread, and our chance to safeguard them for women in the state is coming up in this June 20th, state senate primary.
body:
Urgent primary
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc84e3e2-aa4b-4d60-9277-eb6cf910e5e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Will we let Republicans keep criminalizing abortion in states around the country?? **_Sure, we've had great victories in Michigan & Minnesota. _Yet, recently, as The Guardian pointed out:
> _Nebraska's state legislature passed a 12-week ban.., days after another 12-week ban cleared its final hurdle in North Carolina._
Recently South Carolina was added to this list with an even more cruel six-week ban. _We must stop them from adding Virginia to that list!_ [**We have only a one vote pro-choice majority in the VA State Senate, as _one "Democratic" Senator, Joe Morrissey, is anti-choice. But, we can replace him in 9 days _****_with progressive champion, Laschrecse Aird!_ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca0af611-ea45-449f-9df0-2542a1bbf7b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Aird has specifically labeled her campaign "Roe not Joe" _(as in Morrissey)**. She has the support of every female VA State Senate Democrat, Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger and many male VA State House & State Senate members. _Again, we have **only 9 days until an election **that may **determine whether millions of VA women retain their right to choose, or a "Democrat" joins Gov. Youngkin and a GOP State House to pass a full ban.**_ [**_Will you please join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," campaign by giving Lashrecse Aird $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so she can replace Morrissey as a critical vote to protect abortion rights in Virginia?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0ab026d-5cdd-4dbc-94d6-675931ee2aac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for all women in Virginia and around the country. Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94fa5096-633d-4f75-8e0a-dae8950bf22e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Let’s unravel this... | | |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b2013d6566d149e5a4e8e02db42e46e5&_e=HYA08Sr3NWmHbzBFR6MjKyf0JuusRVYM9zSsfQc1YQEDFNf8Bu6Ej7Sd9IJi1bzUYTTZFwgQW_g-795meJzhkCkmadMW5M19Y_K9eXR4nyV26UrC7_Ygwkw9J5wfon_624bgUPK0ebvVFmFKZPsTkCfdVGIkEGoyrNaufKp-D_ijNZhYohGeTDsopHJ_2vIByPekINLOVICteBoTIiab6LyfpipVwBXXm36Zv5pwZ96YbnVe-JnwjShC8UTViDYZZiq9fC8QnpMmP94ScfB4Nc124ZUGyaoli7w38XSDwF9MgS4bXiwQRCOWghGzzrw6carF_o-hWC4iOpowxLxs-j9WK0XG0BVq8U1OfJGWeVIKQ0HHsg2QNVfE-aEYDFhO)
---
| | Friend, There’s a reason for all of this. We don’t set the fundraising goals that you hear so much about because it feels good to hit our ambitious goals. We do it because these are the numbers that our finance team has determined we’ll need in order to get our campaign ready for our recently announced progressive challenger.
---
[**HELP PREPARE**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b2013d6566d149e5a4e8e02db42e46e5&_e=HYA08Sr3NWmHbzBFR6MjKyf0JuusRVYM9zSsfQc1YQEDFNf8Bu6Ej7Sd9IJi1bzUYTTZFwgQW_g-795meJzhkCkmadMW5M19Y_K9eXR4nyV26UrC7_Ygwkw9J5wfon_624bgUPK0ebvVFmFKZPsTkCfdVGIkEGoyrNaufKp-D_ijNZhYohGeTDsopHJ_2vIByPekINLOVICteBoTIiab6LyfpipVwBXXm36Zv5pwZ94IzUgjOCJedTvoE7d7mpOhiekEAlmKWUAqMdtjUPPSHNm8bN0k7fAqeyGmxAh47AOqeEyTi15AGhNdbM39B7WtKogsIrWWFrJbS9Z8NnQlrJ1TTVxIBx6mCgTJHFKyaGs4ckvGpLr4GMsGZIkLwq7d)
---
...and there’s a reason why we’re preparing TODAY instead of waiting for the election to get closer. Republicans are holding onto our majority in the House _by a thread._ Our race was pivotal in winning back Congress last year, and it’ll become an even bigger target as they try to take it back from us.
---
[**HELP KEEP THE HOUSE**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b2013d6566d149e5a4e8e02db42e46e5&_e=HYA08Sr3NWmHbzBFR6MjKyf0JuusRVYM9zSsfQc1YQEDFNf8Bu6Ej7Sd9IJi1bzUYTTZFwgQW_g-795meJzhkCkmadMW5M19Y_K9eXR4nyV26UrC7_Ygwkw9J5wfon_624bgUPK0ebvVFmFKZPsTkCfdVGIkEGoyrNaufKp-D_ijNZhYohGeTDsopHJ_2vIByPekINLOVICteBoTIiab6LyfpipVwBXXm36Zv5pwZ94_WhEKsBgjnn9TCmr8rQEVmcTY4hBw7SB-nUKqMv5Yo41h_4wK3dh3Mq2kgDLXZBnZiE18vQXDeL6IlCrd8yyUowIXY9JxrNRjz5k0YF17kH8xDQ_95-WJfPOxOzbASX2WUkJjxyZ5pcgEayzeqDIy)
---
...and at the end of it all there’s a reason for all of that: **YOU**. This is about more than fundraising or politics. It’s about delivering for the American People. Fighting to make New Jersey more affordable, secure the border, and finding bipartisan solutions to our national challenges are Tom’s top priorities in Congress. [**But none of that is possible if we lose.**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b2013d6566d149e5a4e8e02db42e46e5&_e=HYA08Sr3NWmHbzBFR6MjKyf0JuusRVYM9zSsfQc1YQEDFNf8Bu6Ej7Sd9IJi1bzUYTTZFwgQW_g-795meJzhkCkmadMW5M19Y_K9eXR4nyV26UrC7_Ygwkw9J5wfon_624bgUPK0ebvVFmFKZPsTkCfdVGIkEGoyrNaufKp-D_ijNZhYohGeTDsopHJ_2vIByPekINLOVICteBoTIiab6LyfpipVwBXXm36Zv5pwZ968TJXJpCTbF0u1iK7G1fwUi6DDwdnnRs8hNP6big6SXDlc8iwsvMJX0bQ0sMo9kQ88T3KkfLp3cnOUpXJY_vdRhKVg7xECTcHhBU-M66TgRHOzQosEr-xWTVHB9mUL5k_Q2et9ZbyL5goT4-nywX-h)
---
[**KEEP TOM FIGHTING**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=b2013d6566d149e5a4e8e02db42e46e5&_e=HYA08Sr3NWmHbzBFR6MjKyf0JuusRVYM9zSsfQc1YQEDFNf8Bu6Ej7Sd9IJi1bzUYTTZFwgQW_g-795meJzhkCkmadMW5M19Y_K9eXR4nyV26UrC7_Ygwkw9J5wfon_624bgUPK0ebvVFmFKZPsTkCfdVGIkEGoyrNaufKp-D_ijNZhYohGeTDsopHJ_2vIByPekINLOVICteBoTIiab6LyfpipVwBXXm36Zv5pwZ95n8AFjZH3CtvM23Z1lyMkvRPaUL-_wpNUJ6HMDdCFOtcy_STkDx4kvSlV3gcR-1zvLUmk0MLU1Z9ghaM6ZOkJc_WytHYg_KWaZv6_LvM3ccvVz9qSqs_zaNUIOWQYncu7r6siZ5s0t9NeGs_L6MToP)

That’s the reason for all this. The fight for the future of our country is just beginning, and it can’t be fought without you. With your help today, you’re keeping Tom in the fight for us. Thank you for your consideration, Kean HQ

clean_body: Let’s unravel this... | | | | | Friend, There’s a reason for all of this. We don’t set the fundraising goals that you hear so much about because it feels good to hit our ambitious goals. We do it because these are the numbers that our finance team has determined we’ll need in order to get our campaign ready for our recently announced progressive challenger. ...and there’s a reason why we’re preparing TODAY instead of waiting for the election to get closer. Republicans are holding onto our majority in the House by a thread. Our race was pivotal in winning back Congress last year, and it’ll become an even bigger target as they try to take it back from us. ...and at the end of it all there’s a reason for all of that: YOU. This is about more than fundraising or politics. It’s about delivering for the American People. Fighting to make New Jersey more affordable, secure the border, and finding bipartisan solutions to our national challenges are Tom’s top priorities in Congress. That’s the reason for all this. The fight for the future of our country is just beginning, and it can’t be fought without you. With your help today, you’re keeping Tom in the fight for us. As a member of the House of Representatives, my seat is on the ballot every two years – which means I’m almost constantly running for re-election.

As someone who doesn't take corporate PAC money, the contributions from folks like you are key to my successful campaigns. The amount we raised in 2022 was a record for a Pennsylvania House race, and let me tell you, we needed every penny of it. (Someday I truly hope we see campaign finance reform, but that's a topic for another day.)

Stronger fundraising allows me to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time doing what I came to Washington to do: advocate for Pennsylvania families and workers. clean_body: As a member of the House of Representatives, my seat is on the ballot every two years – which means I’m almost constantly running for re-election. | = | I know you hear from me quite a bit – and I know that usually when I’m reaching out, it’s to ask for your financial support of my re-election campaign. Peter: I hate asking for even a dollar of your hard-earned money.But the reality is that fundraising is the price of admission for the job I love. = | = As a member of the House of Representatives, my seat is on the ballot every two years – which means I’m almost constantly running for re-election. As someone who doesn't take corporate PAC money, the contributions from folks like you are key to my successful campaigns. The amount we raised in 2022 was a record for a Pennsylvania House race, and let me tell you, we needed every penny of it. (Someday I truly hope we see campaign finance reform, but that's a topic for another day.) Stronger fundraising allows me to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time doing what I came to Washington to do: advocate for Pennsylvania families and workers. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Always grateful for your support, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. If you would like to receive fewer emails,** | | ---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted to send you this personal message.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: FEC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Our FEC report will be made public at the end of June.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=399%2E35263%2E6trWsq)
Can I quickly explain something, Peter? Every three months or so, our finance team creates a budget for the upcoming quarter and sets fundraising goals and deadlines to help us stay on track — and one of those deadlines is just around the corner. Next Thursday, we will close the books on our June mid-month fundraising deadline. The next morning, our team will huddle to see if we are on track to send a strong report to the Federal Election Commission at the end of this month. Our FEC report will be made public at the end of June, meaning that everyone from Mitch McConnell to Wisconsin Republicans will see how much we have raised and how many people chipped in over the last quarter. Our numbers will be under close watch ever since a poll showed me up by only one point against a potential opponent. If Republicans think we look weak, you can bet they will throw the kitchen sink at us to flip the Senate red. **With my seat considered one of the most vulnerable in the country, we can’t afford to come up short right now.** **[So I’m asking, Peter: Will you chip in before our mid-month deadline expires on Thursday to help our team stay on track for the quarter? Anything you can give will allow us to build the resources to hold my seat and protect our Senate majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230611_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=399%2E35263%2E6trWsq)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jun23.0mNvpg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230611_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=399%2E35263%2E6trWsq)

name: Full Mag News

Now, a self-funding country club Republican (and Donald Trump yes-man) entered the race against Sherrod to flip this seat red and retake the Senate for Republicans. Unlike his wealthy opponents, Sherrod is counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him win this race, defend the Senate majority, and keep up the fight for workers and families – and with The Cook Political Report calling this race a TOSS UP, he needs you now more than ever. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for standing with us in this fight. – Team Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64683763/410886649/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.11_b1_glp_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWE0N2RkNS05ODA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-2tKhpwbC01cEqbrVwVxXtKJB9LpLvFXwzskX4zaPI=)

Friend, Greg here. I wanted to reach out with a quick update and let you know why your support is so critical right now.

My team and I are working hard to deliver for folks here at home. Every day, we’re fighting for the affordable healthcare, Social Security + Medicare benefits, quality public education, good-paying union jobs, reproductive freedom, and gun violence prevention that our communities want and deserve.

_You told us what mattered to you, and we listened._

But if my Republican colleagues get their way, all of the progress we’ve made will be reversed next November. It couldn’t be more clear that the GOP is eager to take back OH-01 and expand their House Majority. We know they’ll stop at nothing to defeat me and enact their dangerous agenda in Ohio next fall.

**That’s why building out our campaign operation now is essential. Early money makes all the difference in ultra-competitive races like ours. And since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, I really need to count on folks like you.**

**[So I’m personally asking: Is there any amount you can chip in to help us prepare for the fight ahead? Bringing home another historic victory to Southwest Ohio won’t be easy, but with this team by my side, I know we’ll have what it takes.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64683764/410886656/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.11_b1_glp_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWE0N2RkNS05ODA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-2tKhpwbC01cEqbrVwVxXtKJB9LpLvFXwzskX4zaPI=) **

I can’t thank you enough for being on this team. Means the world to be fighting together.

Greg

clean_body: Friend, Greg here. I wanted to reach out with a quick update and let you know why your support is so critical right now. | = Friend, Greg here. I wanted to reach out with a quick update and let you know why your support is so critical right now. My team and I are working hard to deliver for folks here at home. Every day, we’re fighting for the affordable healthcare, Social Security + Medicare benefits, quality public education, good-paying union jobs, reproductive freedom, and gun violence prevention that our communities want and deserve. You told us what mattered to you, and we listened. But if my Republican colleagues get their way, all of the progress we’ve made will be reversed next November. It couldn’t be more clear that the GOP is eager to take back OH-01 and expand their House Majority. We know they’ll stop at nothing to defeat me and enact their dangerous agenda in Ohio next fall. That’s why building out our campaign operation now is essential. Early money makes all the difference in ultra-competitive races like ours. And since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, I really need to count on folks like you. = I can’t thank you enough for being on this team. Means the world to be fighting together. Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 68033, Cincinnati, OH 45206 www.landsmanforcongress.com = to receive fewer emails. = to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: will you pitch in $5 toward my to-do list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)

| | I’ve got lots of big ideas for what we’re going to accomplish together in the Senate, Peter. I’m thinking BIG and **bold** , just like this grassroots team. **[I’m about to give you 5 of the biggest items on my Senate to-do list, but first: Will you chip in $5 to my campaign to help boost our Maryland-first message?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2051?t=9&amount=5&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)** | | | [Chip in $5](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2051?t=10&amount=5&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2051?t=11&amount=25&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)
---
We’ve got a lot to accomplish, Peter, so this is just the beginning:
_1)**Protect abortion rights.** Abortion is health care, and anti-choice extremists are trying to take away our rights._
_2)**Expand voting rights.** We need to be making it easier, not harder, for people to make their voices heard at the ballot box._
_3)**Promote equity.** We need to create jobs and grow economic opportunities so that everyone can thrive – not just the ultra-wealthy._
_4)**Improve our education system.** Everyone deserves a quality education, regardless of their financial status._
_5)**Go farther and do better.** Together, we can break out of a status quo that doesn’t work for everyone, and make a tangible impact in people's lives._
**I need your help making these priorities a reality, which is why I have to ask:[Can you chip in $5 (or more!) to help send me to the U.S. Senate so we can accomplish all of this and more?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2051?t=12&amount=5&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)**
| | [Chip in $5](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2051?t=13&amount=5&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2051?t=14&amount=25&akid=134%2E52803%2EIPD9lF)
---
Thank you,
Angela Alsobrooks

Peter, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.

They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.

**And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.

Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!

subject: We need to show our strength in numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Today, I am sharing a special message with you.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Today, I am sharing a [**special message with you.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/a-special-message-from-rfk-jr?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=2) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/a-special-message-from-rfk-jr?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=3) This campaign is about protecting our environment, about safeguarding our children from toxic chemicals and drugs, about healing the divide that is preventing us from unified action in defense of our country and our values, about winding down the war machine, and about unraveling the corrupt corporate control of our government. This critical mission **pits us against the most powerful forces in our country.** One of the tools we need to counter their wealth is the money we raise by tapping into a broad base of supporters. **[Donate today! Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=4)** It’s not just about how much money we raise. It’s about how many individuals are behind this movement. **We need to show our strength by demonstrating that we have a lot of support from all over the country.** That is how we send a message to anyone who stands in the way of real democracy that we’re serious about taking our country back. [**Please consider making a donation of $5, $10, $25, or $100**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=5) and reaching out to your friends to do the same. This will help us in sending a message.**Every dollar counts!** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=6 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraiser_june_11th&n=6)

body:

---
| | **Did you see what’s happening in Virginia?** Since taking office, Republican Gov. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64684602/410890262/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiZDVhMi1hMDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVdnPgnvefSYdP-WoOsFU8qLqT7iXzmuBLeOAaS6oLI=)
Peter, as we officially kick off the summer months, I wanted to reach out personally to give you a campaign update.

And on top of that, numerous Republican groups have already launched attack ad campaigns against us.

It couldn’t be more clear that this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, once again.

**But, Peter, I believe in this campaign. I believe in the movement we are continuing to build here in Northeast Ohio. And I believe in our ability to continue to deliver real, lasting change for our community and our country.**

However, in a race this competitive, the only way we’re going to be successful is if we come together – _and stick together_ – as a grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 to our people-powered campaign today? I WILL NEVER DROP OUT OF THE 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RACE. They can indict me, they can arrest me, but I know – and the American people know – that I am an innocent man. My only offense is challenging the corrupt ruling class and fighting for the forgotten men and women of our country. If I were to drop out, what precedent would that set going forward? Presidents would be decided by extortion, not by elections. You cannot plead with people who are holding your freedom and justice hostage. As the age-old saying goes, “I would rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” 2024 is no longer just about an election. It’s about whether America will still even have elections – or if the president will be picked by unelected bureaucrats through a weaponized legal system. ~ | ~ | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ Thank you, | ~ Donald J. They didn’t count on FPC...on facing a Pro-2A coalition that actually fights BACK.

Like I said, **FPC is bankrolling this entire lawsuit to stop the relentless attacks on the Second Amendment and fundamental rights.** We’re stepping up because _no one else has and no one else will._

This injunction is **one of the biggest early victories we could have ever hoped for.** It’s a clear sign that we are on the right path to win this fight and finally turn the tide on the Anti-Rights tyrants.

But look: the ATF (and the federal government) has unlimited resources and they’ll throw everything they’ve got at this fight.
