clean_body: He’s coming for your guns, Friend | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The ATF and the Biden Administration’s most CHILLING attack on the Second Amendment yet? Making it a federal crime to have an “unregistered” pistol brace. Something you’ve been able to have for over a decade...something that is protected by the Second Amendment...is about to become a FELONY, Friend. We stood up to stop them. Firearms Policy Coalition (FPC)took the ATF to court...and the Judge has issued an injunction that covers FPC members while we wage a full fight against this tyrannical agency and administration. But to defeat the ATF’s gun grabbing for good. That’s why and strengthen our efforts to protect our Right to Keep and Bear Arms from Biden’s regime. | | | | The Biden White House, radicals in Congress, and the ATF will not stop until they destroy the Second Amendment. They want you and your family DEFENSELESS against their radical expansion of tyranny. FPC is the last thing standing in their way...but we risk losing the entire battle to save our fundamental and constitutional rights if we can’t count on your support right now. | | | For years, the Pro-2A movement has been under attack... Anti-2A groups are starting to come after everyday people...gun owners like you and me, The corporate media beams Anti-Firearm propaganda directly into our homes, And radical politicians have become increasingly emboldened to grab our guns...ALL of our guns. They didn’t count on FPC...on facing a Pro-2A coalition that actually fights BACK. Like I said, FPC is bankrolling this entire lawsuit to stop the relentless attacks on the Second Amendment and fundamental rights. We’re stepping up because no one else has and no one else will. This injunction is one of the biggest early victories we could have ever hoped for. It’s a clear sign that we are on the right path to win this fight and finally turn the tide on the Anti-Rights tyrants. But look: the ATF (and the federal government) has unlimited resources and they’ll throw everything they’ve got at this fight. They’re hoping they can drag this costly lawsuit on for years...and force us to give up the fight altogether. Your fundamental right to self-defense and the Second Amendment hang in the balance. Do NOT stand on the sidelines, or you might as well just surrender your weapons to the ATF right now. | | | Thanks, Firearms Policy Coalition Paid for by the Firearms Policy Coalition. Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee.

subject: I won’t stop fighting for veterans

| | We stopped far-right extremists from gutting healthcare and benefits for veterans, slashing investments for those who serve our country, and putting America’s leadership in the world at risk.

**I will never back down in my fight for veterans.**

With the passing of the PACT Act, we secured a $20 billion investment to expand healthcare services to veterans who were exposed to toxic burn pits and substances serving our country.

[Will you make a contribution of $10 or more today to stand with me in this fight and stand up for those who serve our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64685092/410892070/617574879?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230611_FR_pact_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_pact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ5NzI5MC1hNTA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecyMoJvdM-rqQ9sPctkNEzIeA__ffkIt2LVGBm22IgM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

As of March 2021, more than 200,000 veterans — including thousands across New Jersey — had signed up for the burn pit registry. 70% of their claims had been denied.

**That is unacceptable.**

This new investment will speed up VA process claims, and improve research and treatment. It’s what our veterans deserve.

[But far-right extremists would rather gut benefits for veterans. That’s why I need you in my corner as I fight for bipartisan legislation to protect those who have sacrificed for our country. clean_body: | | We stopped far-right extremists from gutting healthcare and benefits for veterans, slashing investments for those who serve our country, and putting America’s leadership in the world at risk. I will never back down in my fight for veterans. With the passing of the PACT Act, we secured a $20 billion investment to expand healthcare services to veterans who were exposed to toxic burn pits and substances serving our country. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = As of March 2021, more than 200,000 veterans — including thousands across New Jersey — had signed up for the burn pit registry. 70% of their claims had been denied. That is unacceptable. This new investment will speed up VA process claims, and improve research and treatment. It’s what our veterans deserve. = Thank you, Josh Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. name: Andy Beshear
subject: It's a marathon, not a sprint.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I'm going to need your support every step of the way. Peter — There's no foolproof formula for winning an election, but one thing that I like to keep in mind: **It's a marathon, not a sprint.**

**November will be here before we know it, and every deadline between now and then is an opportunity to build our resources for a winning campaign.** Over the next five months, this team will be knocking on doors, helping folks register to vote, and traveling all over our Commonwealth to talk to Kentuckians about the issues that matter.

**Our 30-day post-primary reporting deadline is approaching, and we need to make sure our campaign is in a strong position for the work ahead. Will you help by pitching in any amount today to carry us forward?[Donate before our 30-day post-primary reporting deadline to help ensure my team has the resources to compete with my opponent. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64685161/410892475/907170691?refcode=em23_230611_dl3_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230611_dl3_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=68911f7f-a708-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkxMWY3Zi1hNzA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9Y0ZpIaWfCt9lcjgZGZWEON-yiAoozUMjhI5U8t0eE=)** | [DONATE TODAY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64685162/410892476/907170691?refcode=em23_230611_dl3_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230611_dl3_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=68911f7f-a708-ee11-907c-00224832eb73}&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkxMWY3Zi1hNzA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9Y0ZpIaWfCt9lcjgZGZWEON-yiAoozUMjhI5U8t0eE=)

From Paducah to Newport, I've met with thousands of Kentuckians who are energized and ready to push this campaign across the finish line. Having your consistent, strong support through November is the key to winning this marathon of a race and continuing the record progress we've made since 2019.

But the truth is, this race is going to be close. A Republican polling firm says we’re nearly tied, and my opponent has the backing of Mitch McConnell and dark money groups that are already spending millions on this race. So while we take this race day by day, we can’t let up, Peter.

Since then, more than 10,000 grassroots supporters from Pennsylvania and across the country showed they were all-in by becoming Biden-Harris Founding Donors. We’re reaching out today to make sure you don’t miss your chance to become a Biden-Harris Founding Donor and get your official donor card in the mail. Can we count on you to be one of the few more folks we need from Cresco to make a $25 donation to secure your status as a Biden-Harris Founding Donor? When you do, you’ll receive a special membership card as our thanks! Friend,
The timing of my unjust INDICTMENT is no coincidence.
Crooked Joe’s Department of Injustice is not _just_ attempting to silence and IMPRISON his leading political opponent (me, an INNOCENT man), they’re actively COVERING UP one of the biggest scandals in our nation’s history!
On the very same day that the Biden-appointed Special Counsel unjustly indicts me on the “Boxes Hoax,” _credible_ evidence is brought to light showing that Crooked Joe and his Crime Family collected at least **$10 MILLION IN BRIBES** from a foreign national.
**It’s very simple, this is a smoke-and-mirrors witch hunt designed to ELIMINATE our campaign and divert the American peoples’ eyes from Crooked Joe Biden’s _ REAL_ CRIME. **
At this point, you can’t even call this a two-tiered justice system. _There is no justice at all in Biden’s America._
The radical Left Democrats and the Deep State have transformed our country into a Third World tin-pot dictatorship. They have crossed a line that will be written in the history books as the beginning of the END of our once great Republic.
_BUT IT’S NOT TOO LATE..._
**Our incredible America First Movement – _75 MILLION patriots strong_ – is the one and ONLY movement with the sheer will to SAVE America before it is lost for good. **
Together, we will stand tall in the face of tyranny, and we will **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left.
Mark my words, Friend, we will WIN BACK the White House in 2024, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State once and for all, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Our incredible America First Movement – 75 MILLION patriots strong – is the one and ONLY movement with the sheer will to SAVE America before it is lost for good. Together, we will stand tall in the face of tyranny, and we will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. Mark my words, Friend, we will WIN BACK the White House in 2024, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State once and for all, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Felix Frisch
subject: hard to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64685822/410894808/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2UzZWM2Zi1hZDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YgKkK24F7dY2dBp1KnGl-nhEDfukmamucFXWiPgRxFs=&emci=a03b8428-a908-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c3e3ec6f-ad08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64685823/410894809/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2UzZWM2Zi1hZDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YgKkK24F7dY2dBp1KnGl-nhEDfukmamucFXWiPgRxFs=&emci=a03b8428-a908-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c3e3ec6f-ad08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie.
Before Dad decided to run against Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty.
My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost last year to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country.
Now, Dad’s running again – and I _know_ he’s going to win in 2024. But the attacks from Boebert and her allies have already started...
His campaign has set a goal of raising another $250,000 before his mid-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad defeat Lauren Boebert.
[**It means a lot to our entire family that people like you have got his back. So if you can, make a donation now to my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and help defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64685824/410894810/1610638071?refcode=em20230611pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=c3e3ec6f-ad08-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2UzZWM2Zi1hZDA4LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YgKkK24F7dY2dBp1KnGl-nhEDfukmamucFXWiPgRxFs=)

clean_body: It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie. Hello, It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie. Before Dad decided to run against Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty. My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost last year to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country. Now, Dad’s running again – and I know he’s going to win in 2024. But the attacks from Boebert and her allies have already started... His campaign has set a goal of raising another $250,000 before his mid-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad defeat Lauren Boebert. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Dad and I have already started driving our pickup truck around the district again to meet with voters. He cares so much about our state and our district. I know he’ll be an incredible congressman. Thanks, Felix ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. | | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskU1vnEAMhn-NuYEYG4blwKEtIpWqfqhKDzlFw3zsToIZMgxC--8rUNpD1evjx34tW_EyeXfvoPkIiDdvVkAE-gCIb087x-2Fvzzk38PX_E1-4_oo4idATPfF_jXfhxSWlZ8O2vSZ6ZRUzprMdkJeZI2yKkV267QTEmsSF-0kVbpqGmyoJuNkiwpbnfkOS6RSCoFEJGQxjrJypnGtqFqpmwtU5RlUKLGrGEPgQgfOpu6W0rKeGw2Aw2r1Fm2hZmtCOgzAYfKjjemeXzcVDeDwotiueXi11tlcpaT0a85jHhho2BI_r2GL2gL1_xEB5aGwNX5joP4IOIlWvCh_nYF6Ht9ZsvFw9kiAUnHY5gTUY_2nJczJnmjWU-4et_bzr6fH9SegfJ4nb4D6f-D5KerNg7j94GCy2Jll99PkV9lAVV7PA-nAvwMAAP__RemYTg)

Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskb-O2zAMh5-G3hxYlEMng4defc5Q9A_QqdNBlqhEd6blk2UEefvCxrVD0fXjR_4I0sg8Bv9ooXkCxFtwCyCC_gSI77_uktZX-XIpv8ev5Tt9k-NWxM-AmB8z_zU_hhxYTBg32nSFaw0Zz67gVtGJjkh1pYpba9kjueFETpNXxmDdeKbGKx5O54aPRWixQl2RUqi1VnQYBqq9a_xZ1WeyzQnqag86GHU3KcUoBxulGNtbzvOyb9QD9gvbNfHBTOxi3gzAfgwDp_wor6tJDrB_NcJLGd-YPZcmZ2PfShnKKKD7NcvLEtdkGXT3HxGQNkXYhVVAd1vATqyR2YTrBLqT4YNlTptzTxqQjMR1yqA7PP5piVPmHU12LC_peXr6-by6CyC9TGNwoLt_4P4p3bmLuv2Q6IrUuvkexjEs1EBdXfcD2Si_AwAA___aA5lV)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskbFu3DAMhp-G3nyQKZ18GTy0NZwhSNuhCNApoCX6ThfTcmQZh-vTFzbSDkXXjx_5EyTJPIbh3kD9GRAvwS-ACPoTIL7_vElar_L0WH6Lz-W7_SrHrYhfADHfZ_5rfgw5sFAYN1q3hW_I0sC-4KayJ3tEa1RVXBqlTY9uMMSKrEPTezodPQ6q9sYOqi5Cgwq1slWFWuvKHvremsHXw0NlHqyrT2DUHnSg6kYpxSgHF6UYm0vO87Jv1AF2C7s18YEm9jFvBmA3hp5TvpfnlZIH7K4kvJTxjXngknIm91ZKX0YB3a1ZXpe4Jseg2_-IgHZThH1YBXS7BezEkcwUzhPoVvoPljltzi1pQEsS1ymDbvH4pyVOmXc0ubF8enmZf3XXH88LoH2dxuBBt__A_VO69Y_V5btEX6TGz7cwjmGxNRh13g_kovwOAAD__3_cmX4)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskc-OnDAMh5_G3EDEYZLhwGFbxByq_lEPlXpahcTMZDcmbAgazdtXoG0P1V4_f_bPsg0vwU-PDvQnQLx5twIiyCdAfPt957S98JdL-T1-Ld_UNz7tRfwMiPmx0D_zfUhFbHzYqe4L1xllJnIFdUKd1QlVU4vi1umRcLKyPZNwtdPK2HZ0rdYWTUvtuS58hzXKWgmBUkqhqnFUzeT01IqmVVafoamPoMqIu0kpRq5s5CJ0t5yX9dhoABxWsluiyszkYt4NwCH4kVJ-lNfNJAc4vBimtYyvRBOVJmdjX0sey8gghy3z8xq3ZAlk_4EIqHaFyfmNQfZ7wEGs4cX46wyy5_GdZUq7c08SUBmO25xB9nj62xLnTAeabSgXfPp1ST-vjwlQPc_BO5D9f_D4lOzdRdx-cHRF6txy9yH4VWlo6utxIBv5TwAAAP__qVGZbw)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskc-OnDAMh5_G3EDECWHmwKEtYg-rbStVPbSXVf4xZDcmTAgazdtXoGkP1V4_f_bPshUtwY_3DtrPgDh5uwIi8E-AeP11o7S90fNT-S2-lFf5lZq9iF8AMd8X9898DKkcKR922vaF7ZRUo7OF65g8yQalqFkxdaI565M-NeLMhXaIrRgZ460R9dgY3ajCd1gjryVjyDlnstJaitG245mJszTtCUR9BFWK3VRKMVJlIhWhm3Je1mOjAXBYndmSq9TsbMy7ATgEr13K9_KyqWQBhzdFbi3ju3OjK1XOyryXpMtIwIct0-sat2Qc8P4DEVDuCjnrNwLe7wEHMYoW5S8z8J70g2WXdueWOKBUFLc5A--x-dsS5-wONJtQ6h_TS3_lv59_AsrXOXgLvP8PHp_ivX1i03eKtkidXW4-BL_KFkR9OQ5kIv0JAAD__2R2mCA)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskU2PnDAMhn-NuYGIAwEOHNoitmrVD_VS9bTKh5nJLiZsCBrNv69A0x6qXh8_9mvZmtfZT_cemveAePVuA0SQ7wDx7deN4_7Cn5_yb-FL_qa-cn0U8QMgpvtKf83HkIJY-_mgzZC5Xis9kcuoF6pVNaqqFNm1n4TVXV2bxjRCaWFaUyOilqrriFrVZb7HEmWphEAppVCFMaqaXDN1ouqUbVqoyjOo0OKmYwyBCxs4m_trSut2bjQCjhvZPVKhF3IhHQbgOHtDMd3zy66jAxxfNNOWh1eiiXKdkravOZs8MMhxT_y8hT1aAjn8RwRUh8Lk_M4ghyPgJFbzqv1lATmwebBE8XBuUQIqzWFfEsgB6z8tYUl0osXO-eVjjD_wU6t-AqrnZfYO5PAPPD8lB_ckrt85uCz2br35efabaqAqL-eBbODfAQAA__-ryZgN)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3ECJA2HmwKEtZQ9Vtz1V7WnlkDBkFhM2BKF5-wq07aHq9fNn_5ZNvEx-eDRQfwTE0dsVEEF9AMS3XzvH7c5fnvJv4Wv-pp-5Oor4CRDTY3F_zfchhWPy00HrNrMNaRqczVwj9UVXqEshs7GpjUAxKEtEQurLVVVYGSIjpFbCDDLzDQpUQkuJSimpC2N0Odh6uMryqvv6AqU4gwqSO8UYAhd94GxqxpSW9dyoA-xW12_RFTQ7G9JhAHaTNy6mR37bKFrA7k7s1jy8Oje4nFKi_jVnkwcG1W2JX9awxd6Bav8jAupDYWf9xqDaI-AkPfFC_jaDatm8s-Ti4exRAWrisM0JVIvVn5YwJ3eiuZ_ycayff3xu7z93QP0yT96Cav-B56dUa5_k-J2DzWJjl91Pk191DaW4nQfqA_8OAAD__8NVmJk)**.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: holding the FBI accountable (2 min update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
It's time to get politics OUT of the FBI and DOJ. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=14313f2482&e=1050d051da)
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. This week I fought to hold the FBI accountable, pushed back on the woke ESG agenda, slammed Biden for his border policies, and took action to protect conservative talk radio.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HOLDING THE FBI ACCOUNTABLE**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9ecb12ed6f&e=1050d051da)
---
| _CLICK[HERE ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=efdfb2f62e&e=1050d051da)TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW_
---
| For over a month, the FBI **REFUSED** to hand over an FD-1023 document to the Oversight Committee that alleges Joe Biden was engaged in a $5 million bribery scheme with a foreign national. This is **UNACCEPTABLE**! The FBI and DOJ are not immune to Congressional oversight.

My colleagues and I turned up the heat on the FBI this week and told Director Wray that we would vote to hold him in contempt if he did not comply with our subpoena to let the entire committee view this crucial document.

**I'm glad to report that the FBI caved and we got to review the document!**

It's time to get politics out of the FBI and DOJ. I will continue fighting to hold the Biden administration accountable and uncover the truth for the American people. [**Watch my full interview on Newsmax HERE!**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8c6dfc07b5&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **PUSHING BACK ON BIDEN'S WOKE ESG AGENDA**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c84b25b7d2&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe Biden is using the power of the White House to allow retirement fund managers to invest Americans' hard-earned savings into woke ESG funds without their knowledge.

**Here's the truth: Americans don't want Joe Biden using their retirement savings to fund and advance his radical climate agenda without their approval!**

This idea is so crazy that Republicans **AND** Democrats in Congress passed a bill earlier this year to block this from happening. Unfortunately, Joe Biden didn't get the message. He put Green New Deal activists over America's seniors and vetoed the bill.

This week I joined my colleagues on the Oversight Committee to stand up for America's seniors and slam the Biden administration for their reckless ESG policies. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5cfc364d7b&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **DEMANDING BORDER SECURITY**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ba97d99f87&e=1050d051da)
---
| For more than 2 years, Joe Biden, Border Czar Kamala Harris, and Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas have turned their backs on our brave Border Patrol agents and refused to provide them with the resources they need to secure our southern border.

_**One agent even said that because of the Biden administration's wide-open border policies, Border Patrol is trying to do the job "with one hand tied behind their back."**_

This week Republicans on the Oversight Committee stood up and said enough is enough. Joe Biden has ignored this crisis for far too long. **I will never stop fighting for these brave men and women who put their lives on the line every day to fight the cartel, secure our borders, and protect our communities. **
